| Dear Patriot,

Tim is traveling throughout the entire 3rd District to **meet every delegate and alternate to the 2022 Utah GOP Caucus **personally. Please watch for a **text message** that will come directly to your phone letting you know when that will be. We hope that you will take the opportunity to come and meet him in person and ask the questions that are foremost on your mind.

Additionally, if you would like to host a more intimate gathering with the other elected delegates in your area please click on the "[Get Involoved](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151608&L=82901&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vZ2V0LWludm9sdmVkL3ZvbHVudGVlcj91dG1fc291cmNlPSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1OZXdzbGV0dGVyJnV0bV90ZXJtPQ==)" tab and choose "Host an Event". Tim wants to hear what you have to say because he wants to represent you in Congress!

Note: If you do not have a phone that receives text messages please reach out to the campaign at **(385) 505-1763 **so that you can be contacted directly as we don't want you to miss out.

Sincerely,

Campaign Team

Don’t forget that Tim is everywhere on social media! Take a look at us on [our website](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151608&L=82766&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09), on [Facebook](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151608&L=33793&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL1RpbUFhbGRlcnNDb25ncmVzcz91dG1fc291cmNlPSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1OZXdzbGV0dGVyJnV0bV90ZXJtPQ==), on [Twitter](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151608&L=82768&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UaW1BYWxkZXJzVXRhaD91dG1fc291cmNlPSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1OZXdzbGV0dGVyJnV0bV90ZXJtPQ==), on [Instagram](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151608&L=82899&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS90YWFsZGVyczEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09), or on [YouTube](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151608&L=82900&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vY2hhbm5lbC9VQ1A5MU1iWVZMVktzMWQzVTNQX1JlcUE/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT0mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fdGVybT0=). name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’ve got a big issue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We’ve got to pick up the pace. We are behind our opponent’s historic fundraising numbers. |
---
Peter,

We've got some fundraising news to share with you: _we're behind._

Democrats know they will lose the Senate Majority if they lose this Georgia seat, so they're pouring money into Senator Warnock's campaign from across the country.

_**A blue wave of cash is hitting Georgia.**_

Polling shows that this race is a DEAD HEAT, but we're being outspent 3 to 1. That's a _big_ difference, and it's becoming a _big_ issue.

Everyone knows the polls showing us up a point or two will change if voters only see a barrage of misleading ads attacking us for the next 7 months. We can't take anything for granted, _so we've got to pick up the fundraising pace._

**[Peter, we're hoping that you can help us out RIGHT NOW. Can we count on you to send in $10 in the next few minutes?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=301aceb5bdb74c61b82b8274fca63e06&_e=XpcfgvFnpVu5SIeTR2MWrijne6WY06w5x8b5-QZm76QHwCqCevUGTql3WjIolCH4aDq3sWkFHZzNXyDoEIXRC-L8jlDXAo7Se39HhNhdUlCUR2W_TXwz67cAjs87Ln_2fNDWcR5Usp6L1KX_psqpT0d-mSXfui33rRrUGvlK7lFFFZQNiPKkTuxh-N_CuPj2Gwf19-1iflTqdmxcXnTYPlVuhralYNAtdm3FFtXJ64KnDvs5l2NXcf9pPN-dN7IB0Q3mFvKHcu6KS7BTkMRy-EYhfk4w7R8XbsX-ODFPmLHaUUxlJ3uqN0Rk-UnuypuWcNUbKYh75QS8PXhLO9pwY_coF5ynuJIPmff-B43V0uYvtyiB_lp8DGiDiAbTuh5OfUNoaCKMaRErl0efLXDkNMDdhbNF5d9L-18nl-vQZxJd5JeBoi-I-fQ8EiqtSTq_V70EhlalRlrElHTj4RVESa0c-3diIVE8YM5oIUUMNTQ%3D)** We will only catch up if you help.

body:

| | | Hi Friends,

I am hosting Rick Green's six-week Biblical Citizenship course at the Firmly Planted Family Home School Resource Center tomorrow is the second day from 3 to 5 PM. We will also be streaming it **ONLINE** so no matter where you live you can join.

Together, let's learn more about the biblical, historical and Constitutional foundation of our freedom!

Sincerely,

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: North Carolina deserves better than Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Trump is rallying his base in North Carolina -- I need your help to fight back.
| | | Friend, I need your help.

Moments ago, Donald Trump left the stage after a huge rally here in North Carolina -- and it was everything his handpicked GOP Senate candidate could have dreamed of.

**Now I'm counting on this grassroots team to stop their momentum -- and we only have until midnight.**

**[Please split a $5 donation between my campaign and the DSCC now to help defend the Senate and defeat Trump’s Republican allies, then read on to hear why your support is so critical.](https://go.dscc.org/go/7149?amount=5&t=4&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220409-CheriBeasley-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220409-CheriBeasley-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3746%2E9716520%2ET51Noe)**

I’m a mom of twin sons, and I’ve served our state as a public defender, judge, and Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court.

Now I’m running for U.S. Senate -- and if I win, I’ll be the first African American woman to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate. But I’ll be honest with you -- winning won’t be easy: **Republicans are lining up to run against me in November, and they just got a _massive_ boost from Trump, Madison Cawthorn, and the GOP megadonor base.**

But there’s good news, too: North Carolina is very close right now, and your support could tip the scales in our favor! The last Senate race here came down to a margin of less than 2 percent, **and multiple recent polls show our race is _statistically tied!_**

With a strong enough push from supporters like you, we WILL overcome McConnell's megadonors and win in November -- and that’s why I’m writing to you today.

**We set an URGENT goal of raising $25,000 before midnight to keep up with Trump and his handpicked GOP allies in the wake of their HUGE rally tonight -- but right now we’re falling behind.**

**[Please split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC to help us defeat Republicans and EXPAND our Democratic majority in the Senate:](https://go.dscc.org/go/7149?amount=5&t=5&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220409-CheriBeasley-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220409-CheriBeasley-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3746%2E9716520%2ET51Noe)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Cheri Beasley and the DSCC.

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/7149?amount=5&t=6&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220409-CheriBeasley-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220409-CheriBeasley-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3746%2E9716520%2ET51Noe)

Thank you!

Cheri Beasley

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7149?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220409-CheriBeasley-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220409-CheriBeasley-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3746%2E9716520%2ET51Noe)

Former North Carolina Supreme Court Chief Justice Cheri Beasley is running for Senate to fight relentlessly for justice, put working families first, and help Democrats defend and expand their 50-50 Senate majority.

**[Will you help Cheri Beasley and the DSCC flip North Carolina blue and hold the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/7149?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220409-CheriBeasley-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220409-CheriBeasley-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3746%2E9716520%2ET51Noe)**

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Trump: “We will crush the radical Democrat nominee in November.”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Donald Trump just wrapped up his rally in North Carolina...
#

Donald Trump just wrapped up his rally in North Carolina with Madison Cawthorn and their hand-picked candidate in this race, Ted Budd.
And Trump took aim at our campaign, saying:
**“We will crush the radical Democrat nominee in November.”**
We cannot let that happen. [**Rush a $3 donation to our campaign today to fight back and make sure we defeat them in November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220409-3-t1&refcode2=695.357359.T9tG3F&t=1&akid=695%2E357359%2ET9tG3F)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220409-3-t1&refcode2=695.357359.T9tG3F&t=2&akid=695%2E357359%2ET9tG3F)**
This rally was exactly the kind of far-right foolishness that you’d expect.
Trump, Cawthorn and Budd are in lock-step. They share an extreme and dangerous vision for our country that would hurt our families and take us backward.
And they know the road to passing their agenda starts with winning this seat and the Senate majority. That’s why Trump is making North Carolina a top priority, and the super PACs run by his corporate and special interest cronies are taking note.
They will spend and say whatever it takes to try to defeat us, so it’s urgent that we come together right now:
[**Make a $3 donation to our campaign right now to ensure we have the resources to compete with whatever they throw our way. We cannot afford to stand down while Republicans go all-in to defeat us.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220409-3-t1&refcode2=695.357359.T9tG3F&t=3&akid=695%2E357359%2ET9tG3F)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220409-3-t1&refcode2=695.357359.T9tG3F&t=4&akid=695%2E357359%2ET9tG3F)**
Thank you!
\- Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=695%2E357359%2ET9tG3F). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=695%2E357359%2ET9tG3F). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=695_357359_T9tG3F&akid=695%2E357359%2ET9tG3F) today to help us make history.

name: Jim DeMint
subject: We're Better Than This
body:
Joe Biden is a disaster. After just one year, he is already one of the worst presidents in American history
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zacern45lnqqil7m21g6v17a23vnedtft8hu1aj0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqr5djgmtie9oj2e9g68c3kc5p78o3k6lgj4ornmkpn1p1ksdrmco74slhmasdgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j73dpl69jrep366jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5ieao71c3gm4oh5u)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Joe Biden is a disaster. After just one year, he is already one of the worst presidents in American history:
❌ Historic inflation;
❌ A violent crime wave;
❌ A humiliating surrender in Afghanistan;
❌ A border crisis;
❌ Schools lying to parents and teaching kids to hate America;
❌ A war on American energy that has funded Putin’s war in Ukraine.
We are better than Joe Biden’s America, and at the **Conservative Partnership Institute** (CPI), we’re helping principled, patriotic conservatives fight back against the Left for the country we deserve.
**[Help CPI rescue America today!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ie32eb4c7g5hd17f7hq2cp0bm2kanjdn7uc5uo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o71c9h2bs)**
The America we all want is a free and prosperous place, where people with diverse backgrounds all come together as one nation – with a government that puts us first.
Joe Biden wants no part of that. His loyalty is to left-wing fanatics, not working families. They don’t believe there is any difference between boys and girls, citizens and subjects, or America and any other nation. They think we’re a bad country and support policies to punish us.
**We can do better.** That’s why CPI and our partner organizations are leading fights against the Left on every front: to protect our border, our children, our families, our elections, and our values.
**[Join the Fight: Support CPI Now](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlvaa10q2gq00122ss39bmo1fk462cdrgmts6he0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o71c9h2bs)**
We don’t work for a party – we work for patriots, in Congress, in the conservative movement, and within the grassroots across the country. True conservatives know how to fight. We teach them how to win.
You don’t have to take our word for it. Here’s how President Donald Trump put it: **_“CPI is helping to build out the vital infrastructure we need to lead the America First movement to new heights.”_**
The Left has the media, colleges, Big Tech, Wall Street, and elites in every industry. Conservatives have CPI... and YOU! And that’s more than enough if we work together.
**[Please take a minute to learn about the fights we’re leading.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsfgaoh4f5r3bbqdddi9ofi1uophekpffinnkie8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o71c9h2bs)**
And then join us in those fights by making a one-time or monthly tax-deductible gift to CPI.
Thank you for considering this important request. Together, we will save the country we love. For Freedom,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|
---
---
**CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE**
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 Fax
[CPI.org](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpuohpg8bam51snd9fhif42t942g3u6thghulabo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o71c9h2bs)
---

name: Mark Blaxill
subject: Help me stand up to the New Left!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Blaxill for Congress
body:
The New Left has infected the Democratic Party almost beyond hope of salvage. “Moderate” candidates like Joe Biden or Dean P
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgh5dgkqkol7ojqug4b35n7l48bp75j2jvobc9b8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o71chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onk69q74t5i6ppm7chle5pmccllm5h70o5l69i78dpicdpm8opk6hj38pb766qm0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4cb6e6rjacj7mti6cc5gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuao79u4ob2l1ufelp85uu0nrccg7ba6ajmlak40_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o71chh2bs)
---
| | Friend,

The New Left has infected the Democratic Party almost beyond hope of salvage. “Moderate” candidates like Joe Biden or Dean Phillips, in Minnesota’s 3rd, are convinced they have to pay homage to the extremist, self-proclaimed “Democratic” Socialists in their own party.

When the President of the United States is afraid to roll back mask mandates, even though it's both safe and popular, or when a nominee to the Supreme Court is afraid to define “woman,” that’s a culture of fear and self-censorship. **It’s that culture that dominates the Democratic Party of today.**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh9oisoakvn1hl11024lb90lb5g723s29nocd9ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o71chh2bs)
---
| Progressives were once in favor mainly of expanding government power and size of the state through spending more and expanding social welfare. **But this New Left is determined to not only use the state’s power to coerce the American people into doing as they say,****but to use the power of both traditional and social media to ruin the lives of anyone willing to question their new orthodoxy.**
---
| [HELP ME STAND UP TO THE NEW LEFT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6e6m0p5r7c96span0no8s3822lajotar5nk5988_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o71chh2bs "HELP ME STAND UP TO THE NEW LEFT")
---
| Independent thought, inquiry, and debate are vital to what makes this country great. **As the next representative of Minnesota’s 3rd Congressional District, I will always stand up against censorship and groupthink, on both sides of the aisle.**

So will you consider donating today to help me turn Minnesota’s 3rd red? **We can stand up to the New Left and end this pervasive culture that stifles compromise, debate, and innovation. Can I count on your help to keep up the fight?**
---
| [HELP ME STAND UP TO THE NEW LEFT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp9golugb7lcq68redtu470hedbmq5ipd01utkvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o71chh2bs "HELP ME STAND UP TO THE NEW LEFT")
---

Mark Blaxill

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z37lvqbbev13g7ia25s3oukqas09u2ifuqqqtf68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o77cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9cjhcthr7cll6ao66o5km8pjbcj3cppb2orgs1rr4t70eji60pb16lrbcsphcsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omcsdn6kp6fdr7cooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1r88nd7jrn9197708ai4irmnmgmg11riq38oe8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o77cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu97aqrn3032p59sfajm1dfd5bnj781nsp01fqoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o77cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt004tdmk5gqicj9bj0fqnaq95ota9lcoervsf70_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o77cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Holding Big Tech Accountable
body:
I know you appreciate taking a stand for America’s founding principles. So I wanted to tell you in the past, Heritage acc
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlqnmmrh1kugsvjq5829tefdd3suqj8ejs0l0imo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o77c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdmm1im2p1lmhob5cljcmr30oj569on8s5gedjb6p72mcqr4t3761om6obgcdo6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup32pjhmsqj4ptnctj3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6h1rknnhrsn0itousfa6h4splkfeetdn5um17jg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o77c3h2bs)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, I know you appreciate taking a stand for America’s founding principles. So I wanted to tell you in the past, Heritage accepted donations from Facebook and Google. But no longer. Facebook and Google are **ideologically corrupt, **so we returned six-figure donations from both companies. They **censor and suppress conservative ideas.** For example, approaching the 2020 election Facebook recklessly concealed a major news article from one of the nation’s oldest newspapers simply because it posed a risk to their narrative. And that’s just one instance. Sadly, Facebook, Google, and other Big Tech companies such as Twitter have chosen to become **destructive of core American principles** that sustain us as a free society. So we don’t want their tainted leftwing money. Instead, we want to stop the agenda of Facebook and Big Tech. We’re taking action to counter their abuses of power. The problem is that their ideological bias targets and censors conservative voices, shrinks the marketplace of ideas, and undermines the foundation of our republic. And that’s why I’m asking you, as someone who cares about the future of America, to stand with us. Heritage is strategically moving to _counter _Big Tech’s ideological bullying. _Our _efforts give **_you_** an effective way to fight back—and stand up for the America you love. Stand with Heritage by signing our Big Tech Petition today by using the secure link below: **[https://secured.heritage.org/sign-thf-big-tech-petition/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo9e5os7phk4412r3lka2bji9njb2sri8nghr2m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o77c3h2bs)** When you sign the petition today, you are joining **Heritage’s strategy to stop the Radical Left’s agenda,** which is being championed by Facebook, Google, Twitter, and others in Big Tech. They are giants. They are powerful. But their agenda _can _be stopped. [**Consider joining us in standing against them by signing the petition today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7veo5ccscisq2nktiduajh80sb18jo4osqa8d8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge2o77c3h2bs) All the best, Kevin Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Counter false history and anti-American teaching
body:
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
There is a powerful movement in our culture to teach young Americans that our nation’s history is oppressive and shameful.
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z30iqa3k86ja14e60dden6ph6e05quq8dhdduefo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge1ob4sjh2bs)
---
| |
Fellow American, There is a powerful movement in our culture to teach young Americans that our nation’s history is **oppressive** and **shameful**. Sometimes, this effort goes under the name “critical race theory.” Other times, activists advance these ideas through works like _The_ _New York Times_ ’ __ “1619 Project.”

This radical movement pushes a narrative that slavery, not freedom, is the defining characteristic of American history. They teach our children that we should replace equal individual rights with the idea of unequal rights based on group identity.
---
| | **Hillsdale College is committed to countering this destructive ideology. That’s why we have produced a new, free online course titled[“Civil Rights in American History.”](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkgr1nhmun0tiqken3fr2an85dftctti3oi1dp50_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge1ob4sjh2bs) And right now, it is available in a special, limited DVD box set.** When you take this course, you’ll learn about:
* How our Founding Founders understood equality, natural rights, and civil rights.
* The quest for justice in America through the Civil War, during Reconstruction, and in the 20th century.
* The danger posed to freedom and civil rights today by identity politics.

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcj4pd3bbralb454nbfoamos9db1mg822din8j5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge1ob4sjh2bs)
---
| | **You can help promote “Civil Rights in American History” and receive your very own DVD box set of this timely and important new course by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today.** As we do all of our work, we produce free online courses while refusing to accept _any_ government funding. We don’t even receive indirect funding in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. At Hillsdale, we rely entirely on the support of private citizens like you who agree with our mission on behalf of liberty. Please help promote Hillsdale’s free online courses and other educational outreach efforts during this critical time by making your best gift today. And don’t forget. When you give $100 or more, you’ll receive your very own DVD box set of **“Civil Rights in American History.”** You can make your tax-deductible donation using the secure link below: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-civil-rights-in-american-history-dvd**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc22ck2a0n5jssaodqh3k6guhg6dg8i3tufu8vtg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slge1ob4sjh2bs) But please don’t wait. There are only a limited number of “**Civil Rights in American History** ” DVD box sets available, so reserve your copy before they’re gone. Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its educational mission on behalf of liberty. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Jim DeMint
subject: We're Better Than This
body:
Joe Biden is a disaster. After just one year, he is already one of the worst presidents in American history: ❌ Historic inf
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1de8nset7p39vqn66sipa32158hk85kdhfpb5hg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo67dbimjgm8cjjciqm8d9kc5gb0ppgsdpb9ojmehgb2phlm5gj2tj4c9ge2slnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libad1geth6cd32mdijfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ieap72c1j6eoh5u)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Joe Biden is a disaster. After just one year, he is already one of the worst presidents in American history:
❌ Historic inflation;
❌ A violent crime wave;
❌ A humiliating surrender in Afghanistan;
❌ A border crisis;
❌ Schools lying to parents and teaching kids to hate America;
❌ A war on American energy that has funded Putin’s war in Ukraine.
We are better than Joe Biden’s America, and at the **Conservative Partnership Institute** (CPI), we’re helping principled, patriotic conservatives fight back against the Left for the country we deserve.
**[Help CPI rescue America today!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5nseoki74ptgmb00qk1c92cn838khpjh5r5sb18_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slie4o36cth2bs)**
The America we all want is a free and prosperous place, where people with diverse backgrounds all come together as one nation – with a government that puts us first.
Joe Biden wants no part of that. His loyalty is to left-wing fanatics, not working families. They don’t believe there is any difference between boys and girls, citizens and subjects, or America and any other nation. They think we’re a bad country and support policies to punish us.
**We can do better.** That’s why CPI and our partner organizations are leading fights against the Left on every front: to protect our border, our children, our families, our elections, and our values.
**[Join the Fight: Support CPI Now](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj6kmenl5bsdtlus5q21ar90noedmpa569c2ie78_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slie4o36cth2bs)**
We don’t work for a party – we work for patriots, in Congress, in the conservative movement, and within the grassroots across the country. True conservatives know how to fight. We teach them how to win.
You don’t have to take our word for it. Here’s how President Donald Trump put it: **_“CPI is helping to build out the vital infrastructure we need to lead the America First movement to new heights.”_**
The Left has the media, colleges, Big Tech, Wall Street, and elites in every industry. Conservatives have CPI... and YOU! And that’s more than enough if we work together.
**[Please take a minute to learn about the fights we’re leading.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0t60i4ldlnv41vd7i7frngooa3ofjrhmh0p1r88_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slie4o36cth2bs)**
And then join us in those fights by making a one-time or monthly tax-deductible gift to CPI.
Thank you for considering this important request. Together, we will save the country we love. For Freedom,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|
---
---
**CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE**
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 Fax

---

body:
We cannot allow Republicans to take us backward. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43968977/339527515/823540626?refcode=ea.f0872523-ceb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.f0872523-ceb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDg3MjUyMy1jZWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BhrXenu7U2zQWMUheEwoJzOgz0qXGWEmm3YZeznrZhE=&emci=20ade581-72b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f0872523-ceb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Peter - When we broke the supermajority in 2018, that gave Roy the ability to BLOCK radical legislation Republicans have tried to enact. Since then, Roy has vetoed bills that would restrict the right to abortion access, make it harder to protect our environment, and limit access to the ballot box. These measures are simply wrong for North Carolina, but thanks to Roy’s veto power, Republicans haven’t been able to implement them. **But now, with the GOP’s new ultra-partisan gerrymandering, they’ve set themselves up for a legislative supermajority again after November’s elections. If they gain that supermajority, they’ll be able to push through their anti-democratic, regressive agenda no matter what.** **[North Carolina Democrats MUST unite around protecting Roy’s veto power. That’s why Roy is focused on supporting Democratic legislative candidates ahead of November — but he can’t do it alone. Power Roy’s efforts to elect strong Democrats by pitching in $5, $25, or more right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43968978/339527517/435245919?refcode=ea.f0872523-ceb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.f0872523-ceb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDg3MjUyMy1jZWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BhrXenu7U2zQWMUheEwoJzOgz0qXGWEmm3YZeznrZhE=)** Right now, Republicans would need to pick up just _two_ state Senate seats and _11_ state House seats to gain supermajorities. **Their redistricting efforts make their path _much_ easier.** Experts agree that the GOP’s legislative maps would assure their party of an outsized share of political power — one that doesn’t reflect the political realities on the ground. **If they gain that power, we can count on Republican legislators to enact legislation targeting voting rights, reproductive rights, our environment, and more — after all, they’ve passed such laws before. And we can’t risk NC Republicans following the example of GOP lawmakers in other states that have targeted the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. We cannot allow Republicans to reinstate their discriminatory “Bathroom Bill” or pass other anti LGBTQ+ legislation.** **[Roy’s veto power is the key to defending our rights and preventing Republicans from taking us backward. clean_body: We cannot allow Republicans to take us backward. | Peter - When we broke the supermajority in 2018, that gave Roy the ability to BLOCK radical legislation Republicans have tried to enact. Since then, Roy has vetoed bills that would restrict the right to abortion access, make it harder to protect our environment, and limit access to the ballot box. These measures are simply wrong for North Carolina, but thanks to Roy’s veto power, Republicans haven’t been able to implement them. But now, with the GOP’s new ultra-partisan gerrymandering, they’ve set themselves up for a legislative supermajority again after November’s elections. If they gain that supermajority, they’ll be able to push through their anti-democratic, regressive agenda no matter what. = Right now, Republicans would need to pick up just two state Senate seats and 11 state House seats to gain supermajorities. Their redistricting efforts make their path much easier. Experts agree that the GOP’s legislative maps would assure their party of an outsized share of political power — one that doesn’t reflect the political realities on the ground. If they gain that power, we can count on Republican legislators to enact legislation targeting voting rights, reproductive rights, our environment, and more — after all, they’ve passed such laws before. And we can’t risk NC Republicans following the example of GOP lawmakers in other states that have targeted the rights of LGBTQ+ Americans. We cannot allow Republicans to reinstate their discriminatory “Bathroom Bill” or pass other anti LGBTQ+ legislation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you for your support, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Standing up for life
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1fi5cgqvtsog3qoq1s6gckkgodu1en3eo69jhko_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slieaor4sph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9imir7cpj16gr39opie8qe6s33e1r66c9k6ao71p3i6dj6dcjim9j30pr0chrjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l6go7epb664qbadhnm2qmash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6lce6sghbk47kd6841sgos3frfbpcra2uevs8kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slieaor4sph2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zckk4nbqdbh627ukh51qck638sq8fsdkdpk8j4b8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slieaor4sph2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi70spibllnjumdfqr2tplk5jchbrghao57km9fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slieaor4sph2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

body:

name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: You won’t hear this on Facebook
body:
I know you appreciate taking a stand for America’s founding principles. So I wanted to tell you in the past, Heritage accepte
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7tompm29nkr3eda3lvjgaqndokk0f0vf5nmo6s0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slieaor2c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfepb0c8rjddj5mmon4pbke9pnas3kcgqj8d5ncir7fdhle9o64dblethnapphe1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9d9k61rmaphh62pm8ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z93c5khk1eocfo58qdhedlbmh6kephlrjuvaglm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slieaor2c3h2bs)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, I know you appreciate taking a stand for America’s founding principles. So I wanted to tell you in the past, Heritage accepted donations from Facebook and Google. But no longer. Facebook and Google are **ideologically corrupt, **so we returned six-figure donations from both companies. They **censor and suppress conservative ideas.** For example, approaching the 2020 election Facebook recklessly concealed a major news article from one of the nation’s oldest newspapers simply because it posed a risk to their narrative. And that’s just one instance. Sadly, Facebook, Google, and other Big Tech companies such as Twitter have chosen to become **destructive of core American principles** that sustain us as a free society. So we don’t want their tainted leftwing money. Instead, we want to stop the agenda of Facebook and Big Tech. We’re taking action to counter their abuses of power. The problem is that their ideological bias targets and censors conservative voices, shrinks the marketplace of ideas, and undermines the foundation of our republic. And that’s why I’m asking you, as someone who cares about the future of America, to stand with us. Heritage is strategically moving to _counter _Big Tech’s ideological bullying. _Our _efforts give **_you_** an effective way to fight back—and stand up for the America you love. Stand with Heritage by signing our Big Tech Petition today by using the secure link below: **[https://secured.heritage.org/sign-thf-big-tech-petition/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zod4g3irhvko47075go32esnvus90jlkni1b0d8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slieaor2c3h2bs)** When you sign the petition today, you are joining **Heritage’s strategy to stop the Radical Left’s agenda,** which is being championed by Facebook, Google, Twitter, and others in Big Tech. They are giants. They are powerful. But their agenda _can _be stopped. [**Consider joining us in standing against them by signing the petition today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztcq94fd1pte78hn15i3tc6g7lgfl4d8k56bb9sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slieaor2c3h2bs) All the best, Kevin Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Genesis 123 Foundation
subject: Urgent Passover Appeal
body:
**URGENT PASSOVER APPEAL** As Passover approaches, Jews around the world celebrate our redemption from slavery in Egypt, and the return to Israel. Sadly, due to the current state of global affairs, far too many Jews have been displaced and won't be home to celebrate. Most of the Jews of Ukraine will be celebrating in exile, or attempting to live through the Festival of Freedom in a war zone. For a Jew, not being home on Passover is of tremendous significance, akin to a Christian not being home for Christmas. **[The Genesis 123 Foundation established a fund to support people in Ukraine, and the millions of refugees who have fled. We need your help to provide urgent Passover supplies to the many thousands of Jews, celebrating the Exodus in exile.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60090195:6qW9eboNp:m:1:3253819041:8DFF530564BC9CB43A3B16770A47D7E3:r "The
Genesis 123 Foundation established a fund to support people in Ukraine, and the millions of refugees who have fled. We need your help to provide
urgent Passover supplies to the many thousands of Jews, celebrating the Exodus in exile.")** In Poland, there have been so many refugees that the Jewish population in Poland has increased by hundreds of percent. The Jewish community there has been working tirelessly to provide for the needs of all refugees, Jews and non-Jews. The rabbi in Krakow said they are so overwhelmed that they haven't begun to prepare for Passover which usually takes time, because they're just so busy finding food, warm clothes and places for the refugees to sleep. **[In these dire times, please join us in helping to make Passover possible for the tens of thousands of Jews suffering as a result of the war in Ukraine.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60090195:6qW9eboNp:m:1:3253819041:8DFF530564BC9CB43A3B16770A47D7E3:r "In
these dire times, please join us in helping to make Passover possible for the tens of thousands of Jews suffering as a result of the war in Ukraine.")** I hope you can find it in your heart to provide urgent support for the citizens of Ukraine, those who are still fighting for their country and those who have become refugees, Jews and non-Jews. All of them are desperately seeking to survive this atrocity and we are doing our part to ease their suffering now, and for Passover. **[Please help us today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60090195:6qW9eboNp:m:1:3253819041:8DFF530564BC9CB43A3B16770A47D7E3:r "Please help us today!")** May the Lord Bless You and Keep You, Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
It's Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092571:6XNbSboN5:m:1:3317145305:D16A8F5A9807F0D93BC12DB0AD5BC5E4:r)
---

Peter,

I've been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio's 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I've watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I'll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092571:6XNbSboN5:m:1:3317145305:D16A8F5A9807F0D93BC12DB0AD5BC5E4:r)
I'll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I'll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I'll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I'm reaching out to ask if you'll endorse me for re-election](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092571:6XNbSboN5:m:1:3317145305:D16A8F5A9807F0D93BC12DB0AD5BC5E4:r)**.

I'll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I'm in Congress, **[which is why I'm asking for your support today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092571:6XNbSboN5:m:1:3317145305:D16A8F5A9807F0D93BC12DB0AD5BC5E4:r)** It's imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I'm worthy of your support and **[I hope you'll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092571:6XNbSboN5:m:1:3317145305:D16A8F5A9807F0D93BC12DB0AD5BC5E4:r)**.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092571:6XNbSboN5:m:1:3317145305:D16A8F5A9807F0D93BC12DB0AD5BC5E4:r)
We've got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they're doing and it's going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm a€" from the**American people**.

I hope if you're still reading this email, you'll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092571:6XNbSboN5:m:1:3317145305:D16A8F5A9807F0D93BC12DB0AD5BC5E4:r)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 1, 2022.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i6XNbSboN5). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6XNbSboN5)

Folks, we've got some bad news:

**_CNN_ just downgraded Maggie Hassan's chances of winning here in New Hampshire.**

body:
Team — take a moment to watch this video of one of our GOP opponents, Joe Lombardo. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43981230/339576857/-1860571788?refcode=email_041022_lombardo_t2&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2UyMzc0OC1lN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrwLlIeMRdtcsNxHAe3X1VKnM96HKYCXUUZHxdt3SfM=) Look, being Governor is a serious job. It requires being innovative and figuring out solutions to challenging problems. And, to be candid, Lombardo seems to be at sea even when it comes to the simpler ones. When Governor Sisolak was faced with unprecedented crises as Governor, he didn’t respond, “I don’t know” or “I’m not well-informed enough on that.” He got to work with whatever information and resources he had — and he delivered. Because that’s what a Governor does. **Over the last three years, Nevada has made a heck of a lot of progress. We were rated the best economy in the country two quarters in a row. We’ve raised the minimum wage, increased pay for state employees, enacted paid leave for Nevadans, and dramatically increased public school funding.** If we’re going to keep up the progress, we need to defeat out of touch Republicans like Lombardo who are so focused on currying favor with Donald Trump that they haven’t bothered to come up with any real plans. **[If you’re with us in this fight to keep Nevada blue, will you pitch in a few dollars and stand with Steve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43981231/339576858/-1860571788?refcode=email_041022_lombardo_t2&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2UyMzc0OC1lN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrwLlIeMRdtcsNxHAe3X1VKnM96HKYCXUUZHxdt3SfM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43981232/339576859/-1860571788?refcode=email_041022_lombardo_t2&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2UyMzc0OC1lN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrwLlIeMRdtcsNxHAe3X1VKnM96HKYCXUUZHxdt3SfM=)

name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdtomge021dd3lbddhuf0baaihvm2arb70e8r9s0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdg66ob6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4oniehpr1obkscr3cs9m61pj8t9j6opj8c9ke1rjbc71eho6cttjmopb7ddimlibfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb4mkpmfdj6coqm5cr1cuobapbi4no)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmvn32mv550suitq0fdih5igdv0cptp1s9vklkl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdg66ob6c9h2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8j9om6p3d1rpcdqisu1v6ohdsom1nee1fst0opo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdg66ob6c9h2bs)**_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo0vluutgg0lrqlj98fep1sdok792dav33b6rj3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdg66ob6c9h2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg8nfcohr55pfg7mmkc8fn6q1drt40tnssf0ktqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdg66ob6c9h2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrk9fcrs8m0co09lpnoctc21dd5bj42tu8qi6dr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdg66ob6c9h2bs)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2h5rf6ipndpv5iunbbd8s4qcoeh04eb0uvmg6n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdg66ob6c9h2bs)**

---
| Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. |

P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z59icpek8ucp0ab8st6igkrkkh45a8i4kg073c20).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zolrsdfedmfgkaj7pdp6puqe9pbdff2619tokjjo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cjhm0or1cph649fg)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Jesus’ most unforgettable stories
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.)
---
Hello Friend,Do you have a favorite biblical story that you heard as a child and have not forgotten as an adult? Does the message from that story still resonate?I sure do. It's the story of the man who found treasure buried in a field he probably walked by every single day. Instead of trying to steal the treasure or just leaving it behind, the man sold everything he owned so that he could afford to buy the field and its secrets.The idea of buried treasure captivated my young mind and to this day, I think about all the man was willing to sacrifice in order to obtain the immeasurable worth of that treasure.You may not remember the specific title, and you may forget the Scripture references, but you will never forget that story**** and its inspirational message. Jesus knew this, and he was a masterful storyteller! His stories were called parables, from a Greek word meaning "to lay alongside of."And this is exactly what Jesus did-each parable He shared communicated bold, world-changing truth hidden in an example of everyday life. Much like that buried treasure, these truths are just waiting for us to take the time to uncover them.**[That's why I wanted to get you a free copy of The Parables of Jesus.](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.-MjStbnsZeFKJvaa8Csg)** This easy-to-read reference of 17 of Christ's most important parables will equip you to make life-changing discoveries in these familiar stories.Topics include salvation, faith and obedience, what matters most to God, and the end times!
---
[](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.-fnchJ3rdD4H5iHLA4b6YQ)
---
| | Here's your link to get your copy and start your treasure hunt: **[https://ptv.org/nna/the-parables-of-jesus-by-dr-robert-jeffress](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.)** I hope you will enjoy this journey through what I think are some of Jesus' most important lessons. Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDAtYTczZDMwOTUwYTM5NDVjZjhhZTFmYWNkZDg2YTIyYzUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/8tFfehc_el3eR26gu66iLQ) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Chief Val Demings
subject: This is an especially important message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I entered the police academy because I loved my community
| | |
---
Friend: This is an especially important message about my 27 years of dedicated service as a police officer. As Marco Rubio launches desperate attacks on my law enforcement career, I hope you'll read this to the end.
I entered the police academy because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm. After graduating at the top of my class, I woke up and put on my uniform every day, ready to risk my life because _ _ I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Florida.
**While I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician. **I’ll put my record up against his any day – but the problem is, Rubio has the powerful influence of the GOP dark-money machine on his side.
As national Republicans spend millions of dollars on attack ads that question my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement, I need your help today to set the record straight: [**Will you donate $5 or more to help me reach more voters and flip Florida blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43983433/339581270/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2869-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE2YWZmNi1lN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZbjxdReTHbXevOFo_CZOp6qps_2voc_NCDd885epMbU=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43983439/339581273/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2869-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE2YWZmNi1lN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZbjxdReTHbXevOFo_CZOp6qps_2voc_NCDd885epMbU=)
Back in 1983, **I was one of only three women in my police academy class**. But after years of hard work and dedication, I rose to the top of the department and became the first woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.
My story doesn't stop there. When I was appointed chief of police, Orlando was in crisis. The murder rate was at an all-time high, but I brought the department together and built relationships within the community. Standing with the brave men and women of the Orlando Police Department, we reduced violent crime by 40%.
To protect the city of Orlando, it took long, sleepless nights. And if I'm elected to the Senate, I'm ready to spend long nights protecting our right to vote, reproductive rights, access to health care and so much more.
I'll never stop fighting to protect and serve. If you're with me, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now to flip Florida blue.

Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43983446/339581276/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2869-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE2YWZmNi1lN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZbjxdReTHbXevOFo_CZOp6qps_2voc_NCDd885epMbU=)**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43983451/339581279/1417698435?refcode=jtk2869-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE2YWZmNi1lN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZbjxdReTHbXevOFo_CZOp6qps_2voc_NCDd885epMbU=&emci=77c3800b-01b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8616aff6-e7b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

subject: We are at a critical point
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW-BdWqHNa

I hope you're having a great day. There's something important I
want to share with you today. For years, we've seen a growing
effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of
liberty that have made our nation the freest and most prosperous
in history. These radicals have found a willing ally in the Biden
administration's education department.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW-BdWqHNa

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

I hope
you're having a great day. There's something important I want to
share with you today.

For
years, we've seen a growing effort from radical activists to
destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the
freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found
a willing ally in the Biden administration's education
department.

And right
now-with the help of these government bureaucrats-they are
actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America's schools
while teaching destructive ideologies like critical race theory
and socialism.

We are at
a key point in our history. We must defend our nation's founding
documents and principles of liberty through education.

And
that's why I'm emailing you today.

Hillsdale
College recently produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our
very popular "Constitution 101" online course, and I'd like you
to have a copy.

The
course features Hillsdale's faculty-the same professors who teach
our required course on the Constitution on campus. And when you
view "Constitution 101," you'll learn about:

The
original design and purpose of the Constitution.
The
challenges it faced during the Civil War.
How
it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and
liberalism.
How
limited government under the Constitution might be revived in our
own time.

Right
now, it can be yours when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100
or more. You can take advantage of this limited-time offer using
this secure link:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/

And when
you do, you'll not only get your own DVD box set, but you'll help
expand our national educational outreach efforts such as free
online courses, classical K-12 education curriculums, and
Imprimis-our digest of liberty.

We need
your support because we REFUSE all government funding, even
indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

So,
please reserve your DVD box set with a gift of $100 or more using
this secure link:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/

And
remember, as I mentioned above, supplies are limited, so be sure
to reserve your copy today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
It's Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092775:J4l3RboNI:m:1:3253819041:2422DE0C8B0F2DECB7E682226B863A65:r)
---

Peter,

I've been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio's 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I've watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I'll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092775:J4l3RboNI:m:1:3253819041:2422DE0C8B0F2DECB7E682226B863A65:r)
I'll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I'll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I'll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I'm reaching out to ask if you'll endorse me for re-election](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092775:J4l3RboNI:m:1:3253819041:2422DE0C8B0F2DECB7E682226B863A65:r)**.

I'll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I'm in Congress, **[which is why I'm asking for your support today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092775:J4l3RboNI:m:1:3253819041:2422DE0C8B0F2DECB7E682226B863A65:r)** It's imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I'm worthy of your support and **[I hope you'll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092775:J4l3RboNI:m:1:3253819041:2422DE0C8B0F2DECB7E682226B863A65:r)**.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092775:J4l3RboNI:m:1:3253819041:2422DE0C8B0F2DECB7E682226B863A65:r)
We've got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they're doing and it's going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm a€" from the**American people**.

I hope if you're still reading this email, you'll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60092775:J4l3RboNI:m:1:3253819041:2422DE0C8B0F2DECB7E682226B863A65:r)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I need us to redouble our commitment
body:
Dear Derek,
I feel really good about where we are in this campaign.
At 60,000 people and growing, we’ve got the biggest volunteer organizing team in the country right now. And these volunteers are already at the doors of Texas voters, building relationships and connecting with those who will decide the outcome of this election.
Our digital team is leveraging our social media presence to reach voters — especially young voters — with the messages that give them a reason to care about and vote in this election. It’s also been a powerful recruitment tool to bring in new volunteers.
And Abbott continues to make the case for why he can’t be trusted with another term in office. Whether it’s the grid, the attacks on teachers, the failure to fix Child Protective Services, or the outright banning of reproductive healthcare freedom in Texas, he’s given Texas voters — Republicans as well as Democrats — plenty of reasons to vote for change.
The polls are starting to show it as well. A recent one has us within just two points — and within the margin of error — of Abbott .
The only place where I know we could be doing better is fundraising.
While we’ve kept pace with Abbott on a day to day basis, matching his corporate donors with grassroots support, we started this race more than $50 million behind. I really need us to redouble our commitment to meeting the very ambitious fundraising goals we’ve set if we’re going to have the resources to win.
As we continue organizing everywhere, I hope that you’ll consider splitting a donation between our campaign and CommonGood. I need to make sure that we maximize the momentum we have, the progress we’re making and this extraordinary chance before us to win [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220410_CGVA_Beto] .
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220410_CGVA_Beto&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220410_CGVA_Beto&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220410_CGVA_Beto&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220410_CGVA_Beto&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220410_CGVA_Beto&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220410_CGVA_Beto]
Thank you,
Beto
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/791c2525-eab8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/7e88babb-f2b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTg4YmFiYi1mMmI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2PcLIgFt5pOvHMJXjLJCdE8daZ-zfBGYeiq_Oxq8X4=&id=108609855 .

name: John Legend
subject: choosing love over fear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10468?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]A personal message from John Legend

Friend,

Democrat Tim Ryan is in a dead heat race for Ohio’s open Senate seat and
he needs our help.

You might not know this, but I was born into a blue-collar family in
Springfield, Ohio. My dad was a factory worker. My mom was a tailor. And I
got my start in music singing in the church choir.

I’ve never forgotten where I come from—I know the challenges Ohio families
are facing, because my family faced them too. That’s how I know Ohio needs
Tim Ryan in the Senate.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10468?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]Republicans are spending millions and working overtime to defeat Tim.
Will you join me in supporting his campaign by making a contribution of
whatever you can to win this crucial race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10468?t=1011&amount=25&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]Donate

There’s a real struggle happening in our country between love and
fear—between advancing civil rights for everyone or stripping them away,
between treating refugees with compassion or as criminals, between lifting
up working families or continuing to punish poverty.

Republicans are actively working to take us in the wrong direction, down
the path of fear. If they take back the Senate, there’s no telling the
damage they’ll do.

Right now, Tim Ryan is neck-and-neck with his Republican opponents in a
race that will decide control of the Senate, and ultimately, the kind of
country we live in.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10468?t=1012&amount=25&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]Tim needs your help to pull ahead. I’m personally asking you to make a
donation to his campaign to help him win this important race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10468?t=1013&amount=25&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10468?t=1014&amount=50&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10468?t=1015&amount=100&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10468?t=1016&amount=200&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10468?t=1007&amount=250&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10468?t=1008&amount=30&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]Other Amount

Together, we can make sure that love wins in Ohio.

Thanks,

John Legend

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=3221%2E3611125%2E4sKwnI ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

Hello,
I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump.
**Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and is – a national security threat.**
Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of _kompromat_ Russia has on him...
Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. **It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him.**
I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now.
The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. **But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now.**
**We’re facing a critical deadline, and right now we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**

clean_body: Hello, I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump. Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and is – a national security threat. Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of kompromat Russia has on him... Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him. I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now. The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now. body:
I know you appreciate taking a stand for America’s founding principles. So I wanted to tell you in the past, Heritage acc
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlfniagg7oivkifp2l8n22ni0ggadp96sjp0uc20_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr70sjgmcrb3clmc5j72o3kshq38o77c6q37clicdir1cpn62qj6cb7m3j36plnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libacr0ephmcc9kmdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ie6p36cdi6aoh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziprd9k0vmua33fkbt8c83mul245in4niu8rohhg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdi6cor4clh2bs)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, I know you appreciate taking a stand for America’s founding principles. So I wanted to tell you in the past, Heritage accepted donations from Facebook and Google. But no longer. Facebook and Google are **ideologically corrupt, **so we returned six-figure donations from both companies. They **censor and suppress conservative ideas.** For example, approaching the 2020 election Facebook recklessly concealed a major news article from one of the nation’s oldest newspapers simply because it posed a risk to their narrative. And that’s just one instance. Sadly, Facebook, Google, and other Big Tech companies such as Twitter have chosen to become **destructive of core American principles** that sustain us as a free society. So we don’t want their tainted leftwing money. Instead, we want to stop the agenda of Facebook and Big Tech. We’re taking action to counter their abuses of power. The problem is that their ideological bias targets and censors conservative voices, shrinks the marketplace of ideas, and undermines the foundation of our republic. And that’s why I’m asking you, as someone who cares about the future of America, to stand with us. Heritage is strategically moving to _counter _Big Tech’s ideological bullying. _Our _efforts give **_you_** an effective way to fight back—and stand up for the America you love. Stand with Heritage by signing our Big Tech Petition today by using the secure link below: **[https://secured.heritage.org/sign-thf-big-tech-petition/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zppiq6g52ma4p0jv4m3vff3a2cth61faq6ga4t0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdi6cor4clh2bs)** When you sign the petition today, you are joining **Heritage’s strategy to stop the Radical Left’s agenda,** which is being championed by Facebook, Google, Twitter, and others in Big Tech. They are giants. They are powerful. But their agenda _can _be stopped. [**Consider joining us in standing against them by signing the petition today.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zod18nnbil38237s8j21lssadduo8fng4p4jb0g0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sdi6cor4clh2bs) All the best, Kevin Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Dear Fellow American,
I was wondering if you had a couple minutes to help me with something today.
After the most recent election, the Left not only has majority control over the House, but also has an evenly split Senate-with the Vice President as the tie-breaking vote. Now, the Left's desire for increased government can be won through a simple majority vote.

It feels like with this new administration in power, anything is possible.[And that's why I want to get your opinion today.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1sZWdpdGltYXRlX3JvbGVfb2ZfZ292ZXJubWVudF9zdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkZPMDQxMDIwMjIifQ/IlNeRY09Wl_SpIXygfexHQ)
Will you take this short survey to share your thoughts about the role you think government should play in a free society?
I value what you have to say, and it will help us understand where Americans like you think our country is headed.
You can begin your survey below. Thank you! [https://resources.tfas.org/https/tfas.org/legitimate-role-of-government-survey](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1sZWdpdGltYXRlX3JvbGVfb2ZfZ292ZXJubWVudF9zdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkZPMDQxMDIwMjIifQ/VsP0UkSpgBN5IsbyHhtWXQ)
Sincerely,
Roger R. ReamPresidentThe Fund for American Studies
