name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Notes from Tom: the 46th day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
https://malinowskifornj.com/ [https://malinowskifornj.com/]

I am writing this to you on the 46th day of a war that was only supposed to last a week.

Each day of Russia’s invasion of Ukraine has brought horrors and heartbreak. But the Ukrainians’ courage, optimism, and success in pushing back the second largest army in the world should raise our spirits. They are fighting for all of us. They are showing that democracy in this world is alive and kicking, and worth the trouble of defending.

I am asked each day if we are doing enough to help Ukraine win. Each time I see a hospital or train station bombed, or read about an innocent child murdered, my answer is that we should do more to end the evil Putin unleashed. But please do not underestimate the power of what we have already done.

It was the United States that warned the world of Putin’s plan to launch this war. Many of our allies, and even many Ukrainians, didn’t believe us. But we persuaded them to prepare. The sanctions that have crippled Russia’s economy were ready to go on day one. We readied our own defenses, foiling numerous planned cyberattacks on our homeland. And of course, we have provided Ukraine’s brave defenders the weapons they are using to turn the tide.

In 46 days, with our help, they have inflicted more casualties on the Russian invaders than the Russians suffered in ten years in Afghanistan (and more than we suffered in 20 years in Afghanistan and Iraq combined). There are now ten US or European anti-tank weapons in Ukraine for every Russian tank — and Russia has lost 25% of its tanks.

There is no weapon in our arsenal that can send the rest of those tanks back to Moscow tomorrow. Even if we sent the US military into the fight (which I’d oppose), the Russians would still commit war crimes as they retreat.

But now that Ukraine has won the first, defensive phase of the war — by defeating the Russian army around Kiev and holding other major cities — I’ve urged the Biden administration to provide the more advanced weapons they will need to drive Russian forces fully from the territory they seized. That’s the only way to end the cruelty of this war for good. That’s the best way to show dictators around the world that if they try what Putin did, they will lose.

I am also advancing my bill to allow the Russian assets we have frozen — the yachts, villas, planes, and bank accounts that in a real sense belong to Putin — to be put to use to rebuild Ukraine when the war is done. There is no way we can send Russia’s wealth back to Putin while Ukraine lies in ruin, even if his forces have been beaten.

And here are some more resolutions:

Let’s make sure that crooks from countries like Russia can never again use America to hide the wealth they steal from their people. I have a bipartisan bill called the Enablers Act, which would close the remaining loopholes, and I’ll fight to pass it.

Even as we work to lower gas prices, let’s speed our transition to clean American energy so we are never again at the mercy of oil rich dictators, whether in Russia, Saudi Arabia, or Iran.

Let’s bring manufacturing of technologies like microchips back home, too, so our supply chains aren’t dependent on others in a crisis. To that end, I helped write the America Competes Act, and was just appointed to the House-Senate Conference Committee that will work to get it to the President.

Finally, let’s purge our democracy of the corruption and propaganda that Putin and his ilk have exported to us.

Thankfully, we now have a president who, when Ukraine was attacked, had only one question for President Zelensky: “How can we help?” Not: “Can you do us a favor?” But last week, a third of the House Republicans voted against a resolution supporting NATO. Fox News still broadcasts pro-Russian lies to millions of Americans every night.

We came so close to losing our own democracy on January 6th, 2021. We narrowly averted reelecting an American president who would have taken our troops out of Europe and our country out of NATO — the very president who in 2019 extorted President Zelensky for campaign dirt by withholding the weapons Ukraine is now using to blow up Russian tanks.

So let’s keep helping Ukraine.

And then let’s vote like Ukrainians fight.

Democracy everywhere is worth it.

Thank you as always for your help.

Tom
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district.

clean_body: [] I am writing this to you on the 46th day of a war that was only supposed to last a week. Each day of Russia’s invasion of Ukraine has brought horrors and heartbreak. But the Ukrainians’ courage, optimism, and success in pushing back the second largest army in the world should raise our spirits. They are fighting for all of us. They are showing that democracy in this world is alive and kicking, and worth the trouble of defending. I am asked each day if we are doing enough to help Ukraine win. Each time I see a hospital or train station bombed, or read about an innocent child murdered, my answer is that we should do more to end the evil Putin unleashed. But please do not underestimate the power of what we have already done. It was the United States that warned the world of Putin’s plan to launch this war. Many of our allies, and even many Ukrainians, didn’t believe us. But we persuaded them to prepare. The sanctions that have crippled Russia’s economy were ready to go on day one. We readied our own defenses, foiling numerous planned cyberattacks on our homeland. And of course, we have provided Ukraine’s brave defenders the weapons they are using to turn the tide. In 46 days, with our help, they have inflicted more casualties on the Russian invaders than the Russians suffered in ten years in Afghanistan (and more than we suffered in 20 years in Afghanistan and Iraq combined). There are now ten US or European anti-tank weapons in Ukraine for every Russian tank — and Russia has lost 25% of its tanks. There is no weapon in our arsenal that can send the rest of those tanks back to Moscow tomorrow. Even if we sent the US military into the fight (which I’d oppose), the Russians would still commit war crimes as they retreat. But now that Ukraine has won the first, defensive phase of the war — by defeating the Russian army around Kiev and holding other major cities — I’ve urged the Biden administration to provide the more advanced weapons they will need to drive Russian forces fully from the territory they seized. That’s the only way to end the cruelty of this war for good. That’s the best way to show dictators around the world that if they try what Putin did, they will lose. I am also advancing my bill to allow the Russian assets we have frozen — the yachts, villas, planes, and bank accounts that in a real sense belong to Putin — to be put to use to rebuild Ukraine when the war is done. There is no way we can send Russia’s wealth back to Putin while Ukraine lies in ruin, even if his forces have been beaten. And here are some more resolutions: Let’s make sure that crooks from countries like Russia can never again use America to hide the wealth they steal from their people. I have a bipartisan bill called the Enablers Act, which would close the remaining loopholes, and I’ll fight to pass it. Even as we work to lower gas prices, let’s speed our transition to clean American energy so we are never again at the mercy of oil rich dictators, whether in Russia, Saudi Arabia, or Iran. Let’s bring manufacturing of technologies like microchips back home, too, so our supply chains aren’t dependent on others in a crisis. To that end, I helped write the America Competes Act, and was just appointed to the House-Senate Conference Committee that will work to get it to the President. Finally, let’s purge our democracy of the corruption and propaganda that Putin and his ilk have exported to us. Thankfully, we now have a president who, when Ukraine was attacked, had only one question for President Zelensky: “How can we help?” Not: “Can you do us a favor?” But last week, a third of the House Republicans voted against a resolution supporting NATO. Fox News still broadcasts pro-Russian lies to millions of Americans every night. We came so close to losing our own democracy on January 6th, 2021. We narrowly averted reelecting an American president who would have taken our troops out of Europe and our country out of NATO — the very president who in 2019 extorted President Zelensky for campaign dirt by withholding the weapons Ukraine is now using to blow up Russian tanks. So let’s keep helping Ukraine. And then let’s vote like Ukrainians fight. Democracy everywhere is worth it. Thank you as always for your help. Tom Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district. Tom Malinowski for Congress P.O. Box 263 Somerville, NJ 08876 United States

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

As the New York Times reported, Our Revolution and our partners at Free Speech For People expanded our campaign to bar insurrectionists from seeking re-election.

Our Revolution members in Arizona filed three lawsuits against U.S. Reps. Paul Gosar and Andy Biggs, as well as State Rep. Mark Finchem, for violating The Constitution.

Here are the facts of our case: Finchem joined the rioters and breached the Capitol, while Gosar tweeted pictures of people scaling the walls of the building with the caption, “The American people are upset.”

The bottom line is that all three facilitated a violent attempt to block a peaceful transfer of power — which is foundational to democracy. By the 14th Amendment, they have no place in the halls of power.

Our members are taking concrete action to actively defend our democracy. But we’re up against the authoritarian right and their billionaires, and we need progressive patriots to stand with us in this fight. Can we count on you to make a grassroots donation to support our critical work? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3439?refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&amount=15&t=1011&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)

Legal Effort Expands to Disqualify Republicans as ‘Insurrectionists’

FIGHT THE FAR RIGHT (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3439?amount=15&refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&t=1013&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)

Peter Willis,

Yesterday, Our Revolution and our partners at Free Speech For People expanded our campaign to bar insurrectionists from seeking office ever again.

Our members in Arizona filed three lawsuits in Superior Court of Maricopa County against U.S. Reps. Paul Gosar and Andy Biggs, as well as State Rep. Mark Finchem, for violating the U.S. Constitution by supporting the rioters who attacked the Capitol on January 6th.

We know fighting well-funded right-wing radicals isn’t going to be easy. We’re also taking on Marjorie Taylor-Greene in Georgia and Madison Cawthorn in North Carolina, and we need progressive patriots like you to step forward. Can we count on you to rush a donation to fund our work and defend our democracy from Trump’s minions? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3439?refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&amount=15&t=1014&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

CHIP IN $15 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3440?amount=15&refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&t=1015&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)
CHIP IN $27 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3440?amount=27&refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&t=1016&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)
CHIP IN $50 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3440?amount=50&refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&t=1017&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)
CHIP IN $100 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3440?amount=100&refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&t=1018&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)
CHIP IN $200 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3440?amount=200&refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&t=1019&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3439?refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&t=1020&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)

Each of these three elected officials broke their oath of office, and according to the U.S. Constitution, they have no place in the halls of power.

In the run-up to Jan. 6, Gosar and Biggs repeated the lie that Trump had won the election, and Gosar organized some of the earliest Stop the Steal rallies to keep Trump in office.

While Finchem joined the mob as a rioter himself and breached the Capitol, Gosar was taking to social media, posting an image of rioters scaling the building’s walls, writing, “Americans are upset.”

The evidence of their involvement is damning, and Americans should be upset — at these insurrectionists! Gosar, Biggs and Finchem have gone above and beyond to disqualify themselves from ever serving in our government. Donate now and help us make sure they never do again. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3439?refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&amount=15&t=1021&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)

The peaceful transfer of power is foundational to a functioning democracy. That’s why our members are taking concrete action to stop our country from slipping into mob-rule and political violence.

Take a stand with us. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/3439?refcode=OR_EM_FR_WL_20220410_1_2&amount=15&t=1022&akid=2779%2E5885482%2EWaBhec)

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

| | |

**BREAKING: THREE new polls show President Biden’s approval rate SURGING **_\-- but we still don’t know where you stand!_

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Yuma County
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If Mark is going to win re-election in 2022, we’re going to need to keep it close — or even win — in places like Yuma County.
#

$15.
Friends — that is the donation to Mark Kelly’s re-election that we’re asking you to make today.
It may sound oddly specific, so let us explain.
15 is the number of counties in Arizona. In 2020, the closest county in the state was Yuma County, which Mark lost by fewer than 1,500 votes.
If Mark is going to win re-election in 2022, we’re going to need to keep it close — or even win — in places like Yuma County.
That’s why we’re reaching out for $15 today. Yuma is going to be critical again, but so are the other 14 counties. We can’t afford to leave anything up to chance with so much on the line this year.
So with so much on the line this year, we have to ask:
[**Can you please make a $15 contribution to help ensure we have the resources we need to win in Yuma County and in all of Arizona’s 15 counties?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220410-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2543_6688874_qYiS-Y&akid=2543%2E6688874%2EqYiS-Y)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220410-1-7&t=20&refcode2=2543_6688874_qYiS-Y&akid=2543%2E6688874%2EqYiS-Y)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220410-1-7&t=23&refcode2=2543_6688874_qYiS-Y&akid=2543%2E6688874%2EqYiS-Y)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220410-1-7&t=24&refcode2=2543_6688874_qYiS-Y&akid=2543%2E6688874%2EqYiS-Y)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220410-1-7&t=25&refcode2=2543_6688874_qYiS-Y&akid=2543%2E6688874%2EqYiS-Y)**

****
If everyone who receives this email contributes, we’ll have the resources to spread our message across all 15 counties and be well on our way to re-electing Mark.
But not everyone contributes, so that makes it ESPECIALLY important that you do.
We’ll be keeping a close eye on donations at this link: [**https://act.markkelly.com/go/15-Counties**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220410-1-7&t=26&refcode2=2543_6688874_qYiS-Y&akid=2543%2E6688874%2EqYiS-Y)
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

body:

| | Folks, The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee just announced their list of Frontline Democrats – Democrats whose seats are vital to maintaining our House majority in 2022. I’m not just one of the Frontline Democrats – _I’m one of the most vulnerable candidates among them._ Being a Frontliner means winning VA-02 is absolutely essential to keeping our Democratic House majority. But Republicans know this too, so they’ll stop at nothing to defeat me. The National Republican Congressional Committee is already targeting my race with attack ads, and former Republican Congressman Scott Taylor endorsed one of my opponents. I’m reaching out today because we need to send a strong message that we’re ready to defend this seat**– no matter what.** **[Will you let me know that I can count on you by being one of the 1,000 folks I need to personally endorse my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43977976/339565240/1059377370?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2MwNWJlMy1kZWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GLRgyc3CVSRWs3JcH1evRBvdYDnn74TcKobUfsGITg=&emci=6cd7ff72-9bb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d7c05be3-deb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7932963)** | | | [Endorse Our Campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43977977/339565241/1059377370?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2MwNWJlMy1kZWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GLRgyc3CVSRWs3JcH1evRBvdYDnn74TcKobUfsGITg=&emci=6cd7ff72-9bb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d7c05be3-deb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7932963)

Thanks to redistricting, VA-02 got a lot more competitive. In fact, it’s the most competitive House race in the entire country.
Some folks don’t believe that we can hold this seat – but those are the same folks who thought this team couldn’t flip VA-02 back in 2018.
The support of everyone on this grassroots team made the difference in that race, and we ended up winning by less than 6,000 votes. This time around it could be even closer.
That’s why I need to know that this grassroots team is ready to defy the odds again – **[will you let me know that I have your support by personally endorsing my re-election campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43977978/339565242/1059377370?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2MwNWJlMy1kZWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GLRgyc3CVSRWs3JcH1evRBvdYDnn74TcKobUfsGITg=&emci=6cd7ff72-9bb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d7c05be3-deb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7932963)**

body:
Did you hear the news, Peter?
---
**I am officially on the general election ballot to be New York’s attorney general!** I'm incredibly excited and honored for the chance to continue fighting for you and your loved ones for another four years – but first, I need your help.
My finance team says I need to raise at least $10,000 before MIDNIGHT to ensure I have the resources necessary to stay one step ahead of my Republican opponent, **and I’m just $835 short.** Now is the moment to dig even deeper and push even harder for this campaign, so please:
Will you rush whatever you can spare to my campaign before MIDNIGHT tonight so I have enough momentum to get across the finish line? I can’t defeat my GOP opponent without your help.
**Here’s the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jamesforny-22](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43978698/339568173/379053316?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk435-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWI4NGM5Ny1kZmI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=87ZYfTqaooeRWPCr0lmBxmE4lg65Fg4OoRuvPAbTXi0=)**

This marks a critical turning point in my fight for re-election. Election Day, which seemed so distant, is now a rapidly approaching reality – and that means we need to fight harder than ever before to keep this campaign on track.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Donald Trump’s Official Endorsement™️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
He could endorse a ham sandwich and Super PACs would still dump loads of money behind it.
#
Derek,
Did anyone predict that a celebrity TV doctor was going to run for Senate in 2022?
You know, I wouldn't believe you if you said you did.
But here we are. And now **Dr. Mehmet Oz has Donald Trump’s Official EndorsementTM in the Republican primary for U.S. Senate in PA** 🤯
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47172?refcode=em20220410-5337&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5337%2E434096%2E-S515r)
Frankly, this is a *big* deal that shifts the dynamic of our race. **Trump’s endorsement is a blaring green light for MAGA Super PACs to hit PA with an avalanche of dark money, the likes of which have never been seen before in our state.**
Look, Dr. Oz is a self-funding millionaire.**1** He’s already spent a profoundly gross amount of personal wealth in the GOP’s record-breaking $43 million primary.
Meanwhile, Donald Trump could endorse a ham sandwich for U.S. Senate and Super PACs would still dump loads of money behind it 🙄
Derek, I FULLY expect Trump’s endorsement to give Dr. Oz — who is already self-funding his campaign by the million$ — a huge fundraising boost.
**That’s why, in response to Donald Trump’s Official EndorsementTM, our campaign is launching an emergency fund with a public goal of 1,000 small-dollar donations in the next 24 hours.**
I need your help to defeat the weirdo celebrity TV doctor who has the FULL backing of Donald Trump + his own personal wealth. Let's show them what we're made of.
**_[Can you rush your very first donation of $5 to help our emergency fund reach 1,000 donations in the next 24 hours? We need as many individual donations as possible to overpower Donald Trump’s endorsement + show the true grassroots strength of our campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47172?refcode=em20220410-5337&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5337%2E434096%2E-S515r)___**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47172?refcode=em20220410-5337&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=5337%2E434096%2E-S515r)**
I just gotta say, Gisele and I are committed to running a clean, people-powered campaign with no dirty corporate PAC money.
You’re an important part of that + we seriously can’t thank you enough for your support during a critical moment like this.
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!! 🙏
— John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of PA
**1** He’s actually from New Jersey. Not even from PA. As my daughter Gracie says: “Like, ew.” [**_Donate now to ensure we have the resources to defeat Dr. Oz._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47172?refcode=em20220410-5337&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=5337%2E434096%2E-S515r)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220410-5337-footer&t=23&refcode2=5337_434096_-S515r&akid=5337%2E434096%2E-S515r)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Holly McCormack
subject: MTG has done nothing for Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress**
body:
We must replace MTG

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43991274/339600392/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_220410_N_HM_90do_6_N_TESTA_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzI1MDdlNy0wNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ArTKOEUapBjGFtVaVKC0bfdpR4tdPCBuHzMIFPfGJyA=)
Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene has done absolutely nothing for the people of my community.
Elected to one of the poorest districts in the nation, you would think she would spend her time trying to pass legislation that would help her constituents climb out of poverty, get healthcare, or in some way improve their lives.
**_But she would rather spend her time spouting insane conspiracy theories, homophobia, transphobia, and more._**
**[Peter, my community deserves better — and with your help, I can give it to them. Can you donate $5 right now to help me replace Marjorie Taylor Greene and deliver for Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43991276/339600394/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_220410_N_HM_90do_6_N_TESTA_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzI1MDdlNy0wNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ArTKOEUapBjGFtVaVKC0bfdpR4tdPCBuHzMIFPfGJyA=)**

body:
Our community can’t wait for change, so I won’t wait either.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43980540/339574388/-742096553?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDhiMWU5MS1lNmI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EUc0w_zN1eqKrizKJHXr7PnmuEqLTMrkNn1gl5DWAWw=)

I’m no stranger to making history, Peter.

In 2020, I was the first openly queer Black woman elected to Florida’s state legislature. And when our team is successful in November – I’ll be the first Black person to represent Florida’s 13th congressional district.

My career, my advocacy, and my record of public service have all been rooted by my lived experience as a Black woman. I’m proud to be a leader in our community, and advocating for change as my authentic self.

**But I’ll level with you – it’s far from easy running for office while being Black, queer, and a woman. I’ve heard it all too often from people in charge:** _“Now’s not the right time for you.”
“You don’t have what it takes to win.”
**“Michele, you need to wait your turn.”**_ Well, Peter, our community can’t wait for change, so I won’t wait either.

[I’m not running for office just to make history – I’m running because I want to make a difference for people. I’ve heard it all too often from people in charge: “Now’s not the right time for you.” “You don’t have what it takes to win.” “Michele, you need to wait your turn.” Well, Peter, our community can’t wait for change, so I won’t wait either. = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Let's win this! = Michele Rayner Democratic Candidate for Florida’s 13th Congressional District | | Paid for by Michele Rayner for Florida P.O. Box 35218, St. Petersburg, Fl 33705 www.micheleforflorida.com/ Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and send Michele to Congress, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to . | | = =

| | Insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn spoke at an extreme, right-wing rally hosted by Donald Trump yesterday here in North Carolina. Once again, Cawthorn made it clear how out of step he is with Western North Carolina values, Peter: **"If you put America first patriots in power in Washington, DC. If we put Donald Trump back in command in the White House, my friends, we will embrace the spirit of our founding fathers."** Cawthorn knows he’s in trouble. He’s losing the support of his own party’s leadership, so he’s counting on Trump’s help to rally his right-wing base for the primary. Cawthorn will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to build his brand and end up in the headlines. We’ve seen this divisive playbook before and it’s up to us to prove it won’t work again. We need to reject Trump and Cawthorn’s plans for an extremist takeover of our state. While Cawthorn stokes division, Jasmine is centering her campaign on the issues that actually keep people up at night – from the opioid crisis to needing childcare so they can go to work. Jasmine has been a candidate for the people of Western NC since day one, and she will always put her constituents' needs above special interests. That’s why she doesn’t accept a dime of corporate PAC money. **[But that also means she’s counting on your support to give us a serious grassroots boost following this rally. And we are going to keep up the fight to end the scourge of unaccountable, dark money in our politics. Thanks again for being part of this fight. body:
we want to hear from you |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43991842/339606514/1278717326?refcode=20220410_f_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGVlNTNjYi0wZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W3jsqAk0nnZ0eyUAo8XpziRSibHFV71hcCNngx56ZKM=)

Friend,

**Day after day, we see how Gov. Ron DeSantis’s legislative agenda is actively harming Floridians.**

Whether it’s banning discussion of LGBTQ+ people and issues from the classroom or attacking a woman’s right to choose, DeSantis’s abhorrent policies affect us all.

So Charlie asked us to send this survey around to folks to see how DeSantis’s far-right agenda is harming you and your family.

**_[Will you take our Survey on the Radical DeSantis Agenda now? (5 questions, ~ 3 min to complete)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43991843/339606515/829757195?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGVlNTNjYi0wZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W3jsqAk0nnZ0eyUAo8XpziRSibHFV71hcCNngx56ZKM=&emci=b3f5ac2d-d0b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=74ee53cb-0fb9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)_**

Thanks,
Research Team, Charlie Crist for Governor

_P.S. Ron DeSantis has spent the past four years as governor tearing down Floridians and dividing us at every turn, all in the name of pushing his far-right agenda. It’s why Charlie threw his hat into the ring and launched this campaign_ _ — __because a governor should bring folks together, put people over politics, and build a state where**all** are welcome. Ron DeSantis will never be that governor, and it’s time for a change._
[Donate to elect Charlie Crist, a governor for every Floridian](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43991844/339606516/1278717326?refcode=20220410_f_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGVlNTNjYi0wZmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W3jsqAk0nnZ0eyUAo8XpziRSibHFV71hcCNngx56ZKM=)

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Peter, can you send a message to your representative today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This is good policy and simply the right thing to do:
#
Peter, our elected representatives in Congress are supposed to serve the people, not their personal financial interests.
Yet, all too often, we see that Members of Congress use information from briefings and knowledge of pending federal legislation to enrich themselves.
That’s why Pramila joined Senator Elizabeth Warren to introduce the Bipartisan Ban on Congressional Stock Ownership Act to stop Members of Congress from trading stocks, once and for all. It’s good policy, and it’s simply the right thing to do.
[**We cannot leave the door open for corruption any longer. Will you send a message to your representative demanding they take action to ban individual stock trading for members of Congress and their families?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11916?t=1&akid=1173%2E420207%2EpP333T)
**[Send a Message](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11916?t=2&akid=1173%2E420207%2EpP333T)**
It’s hard to find a lot of common ground on any policy around Capitol Hill these days. But recent polling suggests that Democrats, Republicans, and Independents overwhelmingly agree that members of Congress should be BANNED from trading stocks.
As long as members of Congress and their families are allowed to own and trade individual stocks, it will be harder to make progress on Medicare for All, making the wealthiest pay their fair share of taxes, bold solutions to the climate crisis, a $15 federal minimum wage, and so much more. Stock trades will only fuel policies that profit big corporations AND Members of Congress, not the people.
[**So Peter, can you send a message to your representative today? Lawmakers in the House and Senate need to focus on legislating for the people — not the stock market.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11916?t=3&akid=1173%2E420207%2EpP333T)
**[Send a Message](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11916?t=4&akid=1173%2E420207%2EpP333T)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220410-1173-footer&t=5&refcode2=1173_420207_pP333T&akid=1173%2E420207%2EpP333T)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=1173%2E420207%2EpP333T)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1173%2E420207%2EpP333T)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

subject: Short and sweet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
It’s time to vote her out and put an experienced, common sense conservative leader into the Governor’s office. | | | |
---
| | | Peter: I’ll get right to the point. I need your help.

We have great momentum right now. This week we’ll be filing our petitions to get on the ballot. We have some new endorsements we’re about to announce. My public safety plan and government transparency plan have both been well received.
---

If you’ve already donated, it’s a great time to double your support.

I have what it takes to win this race. I will continue to campaign in every corner of the state, and once elected I’ll represent you every day.

Please send your best donation today. Even $10 helps.

Sincerely,

**Michael Brown**
Common-sense Conservative for Governor

subject: Wish Jeremy a Happy Birthday! 🎂
body:
I need your help to surprise Jeremy. He's turning 45 today, and with your help, I want to surprise him with a special birthday gift. >>> Click here | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/birthday2022?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

I need your help to surprise Jeremy.

He's turning 45 today, and with your help, I want to surprise him with a special birthday gift.

[>>> Click here to help me wish Jeremy a happy birthday, and in honor of his 45th birthday -- chip in $45 to help him become the next Congressman from Pennsylvania's 17th Congressional District. <<<](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=32ab4b99d8&e=32107e7cf1)

Jeremy is busy on the campaign trail today working hard to become our next Congressman. He is so passionate about issues such as lowering taxes, defending our freedoms, and improving education for all of our kids, that he refuses to slow down even on a special day like today.

While Jeremy is out talking to voters and earning their support, I wanted to ask if you would help me in assisting with our fundraising efforts.
---
| [Donate $45 or more now >>](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=0f4edb0155&e=32107e7cf1 "Donate $45 or more now >>")
---
| Your words of support are a constant source of encouragement and energy for Jeremy and our family.

I want to surprise Jeremy and see how many people we can get to wish him happy birthday. [Click here to email Jeremy a happy birthday message:
jshaffer@jeremyshaffer.com](mailto:jshaffer@jeremyshaffer.com?subject=Happy%20birthday%20Jeremy!) I know it'll mean the world to him.

Thanks for all that you do,
Stacey Shaffer

P.S. -- I'll be putting the list together at 10:00 PM tonight to HAND-DELIVER to Jeremy. Be sure he sees your name at the top --> [chip in $45 or more today.](https://JeremyShaffer.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=168b3aab49521aba8263d07fe&id=99d86adeee&e=32107e7cf1)

name: Aruna Miller
subject: Photos from the campaign trail
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43992196/339608759/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220410aprildeadline3_am_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjhmMTdiMy0xNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tScQfwtcdZa9iGAUgFdfEqbUDHEerSr8OvCXcutzEno=)
---
Friend, This Tuesday, our campaign has to file our next report — it marks 3 months since our last deadline, and it serves as an important benchmark for us to know that we are on track as we build our resources over these next three months before the primary election. **[I’m going to ask if you can chip in a grassroots contribution to help us reach our goal in two days](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43992198/339608761/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220410aprildeadline3_am_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjhmMTdiMy0xNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tScQfwtcdZa9iGAUgFdfEqbUDHEerSr8OvCXcutzEno=)** , but before I do, I want to share some photos from the campaign trail over these past few weeks. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43992200/339608763/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220410aprildeadline3_am_90da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjhmMTdiMy0xNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tScQfwtcdZa9iGAUgFdfEqbUDHEerSr8OvCXcutzEno=)
---
_Though cold weather made a return in late March, it was no match for our amazing team of volunteers who came out fired up and ready to knock on doors in Montgomery County!_
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43992203/339608766/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220410aprildeadline3_am_90da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjhmMTdiMy0xNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tScQfwtcdZa9iGAUgFdfEqbUDHEerSr8OvCXcutzEno=)
---
_That same week, I joined the AAPI Democratic Club of PGC for a virtual discussion about serving our AAPI communities. The Moore-Miller Administration will stand against hate and racism._
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43992206/339608769/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220410aprildeadline3_am_90da_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjhmMTdiMy0xNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tScQfwtcdZa9iGAUgFdfEqbUDHEerSr8OvCXcutzEno=)
---
_I had a blast chatting with Don and Nestor on Baltimore Positive WNST, sharing why I decided to join Wes and form this historic ticket for Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland._
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43992208/339608772/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220410aprildeadline3_am_90da_xx_img4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjhmMTdiMy0xNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tScQfwtcdZa9iGAUgFdfEqbUDHEerSr8OvCXcutzEno=)
---
_And last week, I appreciated the opportunity to visit Atrium Village in Baltimore County. I always love connecting with Marylanders and hearing about the issues most important to them. We will make sure Maryland is not only the best state to work in, but to retire in too!_
These are just a few highlights from the campaign trail, with so many more to come. But in order to hold more events, open more field offices, and build our movement far and wide across the state, we need to keep meeting our fundraising goals.
**[Please, if you can, make a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today to help us keep the pace between now and the July primary. Every dollar makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43992212/339608774/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220410aprildeadline3_am_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjhmMTdiMy0xNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tScQfwtcdZa9iGAUgFdfEqbUDHEerSr8OvCXcutzEno=)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43992215/339608778/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220410aprildeadline3_am_90da_xx_abx10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjhmMTdiMy0xNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tScQfwtcdZa9iGAUgFdfEqbUDHEerSr8OvCXcutzEno=)
---

clean_body: | = Friend, This Tuesday, our campaign has to file our next report — it marks 3 months since our last deadline, and it serves as an important benchmark for us to know that we are on track as we build our resources over these next three months before the primary election. = , but before I do, I want to share some photos from the campaign trail over these past few weeks. | = Though cold weather made a return in late March, it was no match for our amazing team of volunteers who came out fired up and ready to knock on doors in Montgomery County! = That same week, I joined the AAPI Democratic Club of PGC for a virtual discussion about serving our AAPI communities. The Moore-Miller Administration will stand against hate and racism. = I had a blast chatting with Don and Nestor on Baltimore Positive WNST, sharing why I decided to join Wes and form this historic ticket for Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland. = And last week, I appreciated the opportunity to visit Atrium Village in Baltimore County. I always love connecting with Marylanders and hearing about the issues most important to them. We will make sure Maryland is not only the best state to work in, but to retire in too! These are just a few highlights from the campaign trail, with so many more to come. But in order to hold more events, open more field offices, and build our movement far and wide across the state, we need to keep meeting our fundraising goals. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Sincerely, Aruna | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Beto for Texas
subject: $100,000,000 against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Abbott will flood Texas with attack ads, but we’re building the biggest organizing program this state has ever seen.
#
Here’s what we’re seeing in Texas.
Beto is igniting massive grassroots energy in every part of the state. Last month, he won the primary race with more than 90% of the vote. And on top of that, over 60,000 volunteers have already signed up to join our fight.
But Greg Abbott plans to spend more than **$100,000,000** trying to drown us out.
**[Abbott will flood Texas with attack ads, but we’re building the biggest organizing program this state has ever seen — and we can out-organize his $100,000,000 if we raise enough resources. That’s why we’re counting on you to donate $3 or any amount you can spare today.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54961?refcode=ema20220410-184167&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=184167%2E444211%2EhpA_Dv)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54961?refcode=ema20220410-184167&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=184167%2E444211%2EhpA_Dv)**
This is shaping up to be the most expensive — and competitive — gubernatorial election in Texas history.
After all, Greg Abbott has price gouging corporate executives writing him massive six-figure checks, and that doesn’t even take into account the right-wing super PACs that will swoop into this election to spend tens of millions in the months ahead.
Beto isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs. He’s running to serve the people of Texas, and in turn, we’re counting on grassroots donors to power everything we do in every part of Texas.
**[It’s officially Beto O’Rourke versus Greg Abbott in the race for the future of Texas. We need all hands on deck to fight back against Abbott’s $100,000,000. Will you make your first $3 gift now?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54961?refcode=ema20220410-184167&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=184167%2E444211%2EhpA_Dv)**
Thanks for being part of this,
Beto for Texas

clean_body: We need a Governor who will fight for solutions that match the scale of the problems we’re up against. | | | | | Team, We’re running this people powered campaign because Beacon Hill insiders have stalled progress for working people for too long. Sonia's never backed down from a fight just because it was tough or politically inconvenient. It’s how she championed and won criminal justice reform, multiple bills advancing and protecting the rights of trans Bay Staters, billions of dollars in funding for Massachusetts public schools, and nation-leading police reform — even when it meant standing up to leaders in her own party. = | = Sonia has already released detailed policy proposals for how she’ll tackle our most urgent issues like child care, the climate crisis, higher education, housing, and health care as Massachusetts' next Governor because she understands that the moment we're living in requires bold solutions to match the scale of the problems. We know we can count on Sonia to have our backs, and that’s exactly why we’re fighting so hard to elect her as our next Governor. Thanks for being with us. Friend,
Yard signs have arrived! We’ve been hard at work putting them together, so we can continue to spread the message of Rushern Baker and Nancy Navarro across our state.
These aren’t your average yard signs. They don’t just represent a candidate or a ticket. They represent a movement. They represent inclusivity and compassion. They represent diversity. They represent taking a stand against dark money in politics. And they carry the names of Maryland’s next Governor and Lt. Governor.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Compared to last year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We rely on our grassroots movement to fuel our primary victories against
the corporate-backed Democratic establishment. And we received 7,276
individual online donations last month. That’s an incredible show of
support by the folks in our movement.

But here’s the thing: last March, we received more than 10,000 individual
online donations. We also raised more money in March 2021 than we did in
March 2022.

Our fundraising cannot keep falling,
Peter. Because nearly 90% of
Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends the most money.
We’re up against a Democratic establishment that raises tens of millions
from Wall Street, the fossil fuel industry, Big Pharma, and anti-union
corporations. We must increase our fundraising right now, with our next
primaries approaching, in order to be in a strong position to win our
races.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102706?refcode=em20220410-22809&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=22809%2E1203867%2EUX2vU7 ]So, Peter,
we really need your help to turn this concerning trend around. Can you
chip in $3 or anything at all? Folks have been stepping up
in a big way since we first shared our fundraising slowdown with you, but
we need even more support to reverse the downturn.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102706?refcode=em20220410-22809&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22809%2E1203867%2EUX2vU7 ]Contribute $3

While the Democratic establishment looks for candidates with extensive
wealthy fundraising networks, we recruit and support candidates fighting
for Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. When corporate PACs, fossil
fuel lobbyists, and health insurance CEOs are funding politicians —
Democrats and Republicans — laws are passed to serve corporate profits,
NOT the people.

We need more politicians who will unabashedly serve the people. That’s why
we worked so hard to help recruit and elect AOC, Cori Bush, and Jamaal
Bowman. It’s why we support the Squad every step of the way in Congress.
It’s why we’re fighting to elect a slate of working-class progressives to
join the Justice Democrats bloc on Capitol Hill.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102706?refcode=em20220410-22809&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22809%2E1203867%2EUX2vU7 ]We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, and neither do our
candidates. That’s why we’re relying on you to help us raise what we need
to win this year. Can you chip in $3 or anything at all
today?

We appreciate anything you can give and all the ways you support our
movement. We know we can only do this together with you.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=22809%2E1203867%2EUX2vU7 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=22809%2E1203867%2EUX2vU7 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220410-22809-footer&t=1025&refcode2=22809_1203867_UX2vU7&akid=22809%2E1203867%2EUX2vU7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=22809%2E1203867%2EUX2vU7

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

This is Representative Pramila Jayapal.

In 2016, I became the first South Asian American woman elected to Congress, and I am now the sole Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus.

**We need to build a bench of progressive women of color to fight for our communities, which is why I’m so thrilled today to endorse Nida Allam for NC-4.**

Nida is a proud progressive Democrat who will fight for bold, transformational policies and get things done for working families.

_And Nida would be the FIRST Muslim woman ever elected to Congress from the U.S. South._

[Nida’s election is only 37 days away, and she still needs to raise $4,892 before midnight to hit crucial budget goals. Will you join me and pitch in $27 right now? >>](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/50JQ4Lh0OeBraCSC4UXB4Q~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkNbgOP0TJaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQxMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9qYXlhcGFsX2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTI3Y1VwUzRjdEVhcVB4a2NCbUhSbDhrSEtrSyZyZWZjb2RlMj0yN2NVcFM0Y3RFYXFQeGtjQm1IUmw4a0hLa0smcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjdjVXBTNGN0RWFxUHhrY0JtSFJsOGtIS2tLVwNzcGNCCmJLDjNTYlEXguRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABw)
[](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/50JQ4Lh0OeBraCSC4UXB4Q~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkNbgOP0TJaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQxMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9qYXlhcGFsX2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTI3Y1VwUzRjdEVhcVB4a2NCbUhSbDhrSEtrSyZyZWZjb2RlMj0yN2NVcFM0Y3RFYXFQeGtjQm1IUmw4a0hLa0smcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjdjVXBTNGN0RWFxUHhrY0JtSFJsOGtIS2tLVwNzcGNCCmJLDjNTYlEXguRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABw)
I’m asking you to make a choice:

– Either we can sit back, let super PACs and corporate PACs destroy Nida’s campaign, and lose our chance to make history with this race.

– Or we can step up, help Nida WIN this race, and send a progressive champion to Congress to fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and a brighter future for us all.

[I am so proud to support Nida and her groundbreaking candidacy. Will you join me by contributing $27, or whatever you can, to Nida’s campaign today before her midnight deadline in 8 hours? >>](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/50JQ4Lh0OeBraCSC4UXB4Q~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkNbgOP0TJaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQxMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9qYXlhcGFsX2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTI3Y1VwUzRjdEVhcVB4a2NCbUhSbDhrSEtrSyZyZWZjb2RlMj0yN2NVcFM0Y3RFYXFQeGtjQm1IUmw4a0hLa0smcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjdjVXBTNGN0RWFxUHhrY0JtSFJsOGtIS2tLVwNzcGNCCmJLDjNTYlEXguRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABw)

clean_body: | | This is Representative Pramila Jayapal. In 2016, I became the first South Asian American woman elected to Congress, and I am now the sole Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. We need to build a bench of progressive women of color to fight for our communities, which is why I’m so thrilled today to endorse Nida Allam for NC-4. Nida is a proud progressive Democrat who will fight for bold, transformational policies and get things done for working families. And Nida would be the FIRST Muslim woman ever elected to Congress from the U.S. South. I’m asking you to make a choice: – Either we can sit back, let super PACs and corporate PACs destroy Nida’s campaign, and lose our chance to make history with this race. – Or we can step up, help Nida WIN this race, and send a progressive champion to Congress to fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and a brighter future for us all. | | | | | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ Thank you, Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal | 6409 Fayetteville Rd Ste 120-378 Durham, NC 27713 Paid for by Nida for NC Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. name: Peter Welch
subject: A minimum wage jump supports and grows America’s middle class
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Raising the federal minimum wage will be a top priority for me as senator. Let’s keep working to win this race.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=218%2E61531%2ESf06li)
Hello,
One of the first votes I cast as a new congressman was to raise the minimum wage. We passed that bill, and the president signed it into law.
That was in 2007. Congress hasn’t increased the minimum wage since then, the longest gap without a raise since the minimum wage was created.
I’ve been fighting to raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour and make it automatically rise with the cost of living—so inflation wouldn’t mean a pay cut for hardworking Americans. **You know, economists say that if the federal minimum wage kept up with workers’ productivity, like it used to, it would be $23 an hour today!**
An increased minimum wage gives hard working folks a chance at the American dream, and I’ll vote for a minimum wage increase as senator just like I did as congressman. But if the GOP flips this targeted seat and takes back the Senate, there will be no chance at increasing the minimum wage.
[**If you believe in a $15 minimum wage that’s fair to workers, pitch in $15 to this campaign to make it a reality. We can do this together.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1783?t=3&akid=218%2E61531%2ESf06li)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1783?t=14&amount=3&akid=218%2E61531%2ESf06li)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1783?t=16&amount=15&akid=218%2E61531%2ESf06li)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1783?t=18&amount=28&akid=218%2E61531%2ESf06li)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1783?t=20&amount=50&akid=218%2E61531%2ESf06li)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1783?t=10&amount=100&akid=218%2E61531%2ESf06li)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1783?t=12&akid=218%2E61531%2ESf06li)
---

---
The vast majority of Americans support bumping the federal minimum wage up to $15 an hour.
It’s popular, and it’s the right thing to do—hard working Americans shouldn’t have to worry about putting food on the table and keeping a roof over their heads. Raising the minimum wage up to $15 an hour by 2025 would give nearly 30 million workers a raise while lifting over a million families out of poverty.
We’ve all seen that times are tough and costs are rising for millions of working people. A minimum wage hike is a direct way to relieve some of that stress at the kitchen table. It will be a top priority for me as Vermont’s next senator. But first, we’ve got to keep working together to win this race.
[**Chip in $15 to our Senate campaign today.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1783?t=7&akid=218%2E61531%2ESf06li)
Thank you,
Peter

---

Hello,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign against Chuck Grassley and help me protect our Democratic Senate majority. But before I do, let me explain why your donation to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue is so important right now.
I am a hard target for a GOP attack ad. I was born and raised in rural northwest Iowa, and I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. From enlisting on scholarship in college to retiring as a three-star Admiral, none of that matters because the GOP’s Super PACs will drum up a misleading ad and even attack my service.
In my last election, Super PACs spent millions of dollars against me. And this time, Mitch McConnell and his billionaire buddies are raising even more to spin lying tales about me on TVs all across Iowa.
There’s one reason: **Mitch McConnell is alarmed because I’m the guy who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. I’m it. And if I do win, Democrats will hold onto our Democratic majority in the Senate.**
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows a paltry 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley.
I’m happy for the fight ahead, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win and turn Iowa blue. **We’re less than 36 hours away from our important fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford right now – before our critical fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43994038/339618755/-42398318?refcode=em20220410pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzFlNTJiMy0yYWI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_G2B3MMvclxf39Hyf3PQvIIA-u8vf2uSEVxP-z7yiTY=)

subject: Outspent 3 to 1

body:

Fellow American,

We've got some fundraising news to share with you: _we're behind._

Democrats know they will lose the Senate Majority if they lose this Georgia seat, so they're pouring money into Senator Warnock's campaign from across the country.

_**A blue wave of cash is hitting Georgia.**_

Polling shows that this race is a DEAD HEAT, but we're being outspent 3 to 1. That's a _big_ difference, and it's becoming a _big_ issue.

Everyone knows the polls showing us up a point or two will change if voters only see a barrage of misleading ads attacking us for the next 7 months. We can't take anything for granted, _so we've got to pick up the fundraising pace._

clean_body: We’ve got to pick up the pace. We are behind our opponent’s historic fundraising numbers. | Fellow American, We've got some fundraising news to share with you: we're behind. Democrats know they will lose the Senate Majority if they lose this Georgia seat, so they're pouring money into Senator Warnock's campaign from across the country. A blue wave of cash is hitting Georgia. Polling shows that this race is a DEAD HEAT, but we're being outspent 3 to 1. That's a big difference, and it's becoming a big issue. Everyone knows the polls showing us up a point or two will change if voters only see a barrage of misleading ads attacking us for the next 7 months. We can't take anything for granted, so we've got to pick up the fundraising pace. We will only catch up if you help. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Hey everyone,

On the road right now, on a swing through 10 counties in Central PA, 7 of them rural. Just left Lancaster County, Pennsylvania.

I've got about 50 minutes in the car before our next event, so I wanted to write an email and give you my honest thoughts on the news from last night.

**Donald Trump is officially stepping into the PA Senate race.**

I've seen a lot of Trump 2024 flags on this trip, and it's clear he's going all out to win in PA in 2022.

It's also clear that he doesn't want to run against me again.

He thinks he can put Oz in the Senate and pave the way for a Trump 2024 victory.

He thought the same thing about Rick Saccone, Keith Rothfus, and Sean Parnell -- and we beat them. Three times in a row.

John Fetterman has never beaten a Republican in a tough race. I have -- three times in a row.

With so much at stake -- voting rights, the right to choose, Medicare and Social Security, among many others -- we need to win.

I can win. Trump knows I can win, and that Fetterman can't.

THEN: Thousands of grassroots supporters stepped up to put me back on track and protect our Senate majority. NOW: I only have $1,119 to go , and I need your help to close this gap before midnight. I know we have what it takes to defeat Marco Rubio and flip Florida blue in November, and I'm so proud of everything this grassroots movement has accomplished. If just one more supporter from your area chips in right now, I'll hit my goal before midnight.= | | = I can't thank you enough for your support. Val Demings \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Val Demings (last chance) Subject: dangerously behind | | | = With just hours until my fundraising deadline, I'm still 11% short of my daily fundraising goal – and with Senate control on the line in this race and polling showing me in the margin of error, I have to ask: = | | = I have a real chance to win this race and protect our Democratic Senate majority, friend. CNN is even reporting that Florida is a top pick-up opportunity for Democrats! But with Marco Rubio running deceitful attack ads to smear my reputation and national Republicans pouring $10 MILLION into Florida to organize on the ground, I need your help to fight back and win. If I fall behind on fundraising goals, the GOP will take that as a sign I've lost momentum, and they'll double down to turn Florida red permanently. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I can't thank you enough for doing your part to keep the Senate in Democratic hands. **New Book Out Now! **

Dawn of the Brave, Mike's new children’s book, is now out! Order exclusively at [BraveBooks.com](BraveBooks.com) \- $15 of every subscription goes to Samaritans Purse.

**In the News**
**WALTZ ON AIDING UKRAINE**

_"If Zelensky continues to strike targets INSIDE of Russia, will Biden pump the breaks on “offensive” lethal aid? Will we give Ukraine everything they need for a decisive battlefield victory or allow Putin to dictate the terms?" _

[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e2926933218f45b79e61b4eec3793dde&_e=-12Ls3HwYXuueeGc0CuiWSD6-Qw_v5tunAmamCTY7jb_h1syg3GweSv9zvIkye-CPGFt686DbZNE4lrmA1Djt5AyM-U-K1Szj7Bk3d1BTSJsV7ZlGtorv_MN7mA8d1-G0bVZeaZOwfiYm2PAFKhHu0Cr_HzPCSyvRYs5xGKvyCPZ2LjVTyFYCouzFVKkihAmKqW6wlPoNLAvBRa9nhl2Zzayclk2V_cVSTQcQKSiGbcbvy-V-bImEXRINMZ-2StCCSLxSxROuTdkXXMKG-1n62Y7cMrz2Hi44MJ6Qm_-SBeHlTMIRam-am_2VnsYrORWohiFsgXbsf_Z9lKYs3thXaO8eXCpnGBK0eS-_VfcSGBRkmD-9wIY8et0O9s9uEFd4kArK1S7pUH0Ey8OVncCXg%3D%3D)

Watch the interview [here](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e2926933218f45b79e61b4eec3793dde&_e=-12Ls3HwYXuueeGc0CuiWSD6-Qw_v5tunAmamCTY7jb_h1syg3GweSv9zvIkye-CPGFt686DbZNE4lrmA1Djt5AyM-U-K1Szj7Bk3d1BTSJsV7ZlGtorv_MN7mA8d1-G0bVZeaZOwfiYm2PAFKhHu0Cr_HzPCSyvRYs5xGKvyCPZ2LjVTyFYCouzFVKkihAm3YGfVnxmR9RFSrvhUaYNxs77m-GrzOMRalLOo-LdRIm6V9Iw1AZZrHYUjWd9i_g9DtDEBDcjxrjWy5t6xXLfZXejJ-oeduy0Fe0YMGEB4dEQu3qD3l-9fawz0PhFgdzXWy2tB2iemmrS-Odq7xSvxIzdg1QPSAQASm8pz8bPeuI3p8xP0ikyMf5PkA7KHNRUZuMYMdDSX58C8ARp5mmMcg%3D%3D).
**WALTZ ON BIDEN'S HANDLING OF PUTIN**

Then on Tuesday, Mike Waltz joined [Fox & Friends](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e2926933218f45b79e61b4eec3793dde&_e=-12Ls3HwYXuueeGc0CuiWWmCNkixMkhn-0FXnj_owBSVD8FznfBGD3my979uIR6WCtkh238mszpuHrEH_YBNgku2fBp8bz42W85jkUhhRHzHdOc31eJIAepZE3qU_5Zo--vigVg0Vx8XGi2GLD0DaG398TNVLNDZ11Gc80zyLCqGlM1jJ-3gZQ7LEHOAUgiH-M1Q4ydv39QpGEz_W9vemyM-Gks_GTwYxO6Wi9oi6I9t2h8G_1KOJF2I7pJ-X4Y-dE0RRKAxkC9q9NiAB0AZG-yqN0HgFpnWJinXqve6i54qv1CS7kxAk3X3-kP9hSx6eMsflZwCqPdvTeYfjLl-5FYf0HnyM5uXSfMlEcz80NRaC5XxAi6GjRsvkAw1Jse38B2fiqbwl3WPWRETuyWM0A%3D%3D) to talk discuss Florida's new Parental Rights in Education law and Biden's handling of Putin:

[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e2926933218f45b79e61b4eec3793dde&_e=-12Ls3HwYXuueeGc0CuiWWmCNkixMkhn-0FXnj_owBSVD8FznfBGD3my979uIR6WCtkh238mszpuHrEH_YBNgku2fBp8bz42W85jkUhhRHzHdOc31eJIAepZE3qU_5Zo--vigVg0Vx8XGi2GLD0DaG398TNVLNDZ11Gc80zyLCqGlM1jJ-3gZQ7LEHOAUgiHiLzTbwYbBDbSzSOq-uV4irSEsJp7CRrW6jXFb8ndZvl9YICK1nvLajArmx6OgebOKWPdmkIXz2-IPjGsa6DZSXOb6t3Lp41WH1et9ebb-BtpPSfKcvOaLsUv5746twxUP1eoX7DG0GgVv8SHMn4oe60aXRCTji5OqRcuFnRPPTuC6wfw5knPByLG3EwLEoHBhwnVTPWorNTqaNcaH-5y_A%3D%3D)

**WALTZ ON UKRAINIAN TROOPS**

On Wednesday, Mike joined [Newsmax's Wake Up America](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e2926933218f45b79e61b4eec3793dde&_e=-12Ls3HwYXuueeGc0CuiWRB8JsgjWf-au5MB9j6gQ6xeKni4Z6pdEC7paOmHxV17XeLrHjthETw4PKQeMGUcaNTuNkHtDkQ7JmFnr_oXS3YdHRyNZTO2k0f6oWYAUL52dbNkjO3kJVo6RL8Vrhex26lEIeSi5lnwi3qC7GXl2r02FYGMSL3KAeEqxs3kXuGWAH5vp9ZzLKTGrr65K-Ot4ZtlmV5kwNP8l1XAI6uKUnsOQvL3-AxoLarw3MJmQHiiOVI0rCPz56Zk4s8S_iE2Oy7kaZJAFA9N0BJU_5DGMtfNEsShzmc5awuSO6i9bdv9ieeg7hhBNElj55YAiRXdlj6lt28T-sd64Hc0vl57mkiwKWpQaI4tQHDo8fadcMjGU5cJuehF6_1ZmG4RTylPSw%3D%3D) to discuss whether Ukrainian troops are being trained to use advanced US aid.

"_The Biden White House continues to tiptoe around and let Putin set and dictate the terms_."

[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e2926933218f45b79e61b4eec3793dde&_e=-12Ls3HwYXuueeGc0CuiWRB8JsgjWf-au5MB9j6gQ6xeKni4Z6pdEC7paOmHxV17XeLrHjthETw4PKQeMGUcaNTuNkHtDkQ7JmFnr_oXS3YdHRyNZTO2k0f6oWYAUL52dbNkjO3kJVo6RL8Vrhex26lEIeSi5lnwi3qC7GXl2r02FYGMSL3KAeEqxs3kXuGWIPr1JYiU5-ht3ahy_fjNzISc4mJ9OxX1GZma1R-1nXBtWIrmkm6E8qsRPKNtn96iOmR4Z9SRY0P5jyFUhS5ocDJ04NXGDsIRT7-WTPGk2xBReaPh_tAtgLNCvsBQhsrk7oVIZduwNXIWYHAprAuRnT9XPBR_q01Sz-t6SkwEO7nym4EnPVdrV9N_McrSc83P3ue_8XE6FvQYDfUbDbsi3w%3D%3D)

On Thursday, Mike was on [Fox Business](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e2926933218f45b79e61b4eec3793dde&_e=-12Ls3HwYXuueeGc0CuiWf90qRiGe1LEZ1wTl1OSFgVIA_5FYClIBSgwlRWTFEuU8cJ3BaoTzqtSzb-F-UEQFYWp4SknJ840PrgJgUs4BJBfD_IIdnWwvBAZbPE4vy--16vMZ7YoCOyiBXnGvPE8PP7StIAhTkKexSPEvWFnRs6r8quHuiVmjwqOlkGn0XybSzq9iJyT-opqVgB6lyqkF2vnhiADcCnwuqcAG3TPtwqLWefTxNmqX6SQAb4BqSHjZvVDxZbiVexP9sbligzkC8tecsMR3DPC9KdO_xfyP1BIzSMp6V2jIC9xJj0PAAcGON66pI9KxUI2kaRjbnQQPX2HLna8EneSciDZIm0aMN2zZ6W6wzs54HMsYdLqpMNya-zklfZ36f3S-YfTNNeb2w%3D%3D) where he discussed the effects Biden's blunders and apparent lack of strategy as president.

**WALTZ ON THE OFFENSIVE PLAY**

To end the week, Mike joined Fox News' [America Reports](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e2926933218f45b79e61b4eec3793dde&_e=-12Ls3HwYXuueeGc0CuiWXP4uPXSd8d85gEWb54BERj32uFEEIinjqRrpd2_tJzZMpqSqvFjtiRg2MYHow1WjJYcAEdXAIBC0hK_cUDtqruif4CPKaeFJb2P6xUZ7q3W-n-Vq9wE2UfwsRY29k6ZYLbXynx5Ci7shHRxgdnxzgix-kdYKHdyJRxTJjAkBENQMaXPuqeASK6S44D3OuBuaUSGlO1BWygDOEmB5M2I5lcpX_l-PITwl_CH9uzhyvU3s7GUPx59t8v3mfEwzWGz6a83zM_NSys42AFzSqQbA_6IHejZY3PMJyFWaMY1JpYfxOSiFbQQG3TvutXzIMV2KXmnBYOcEGO-wWsca5wO9cU%3D) on Friday to discuss the developing conflict in Ukraine and what the Pentagon must do to help the Ukrainian resistance:

_“_ _I would personally like to see, and I've pressed the Pentagon on this, to give them [Ukraine] offensive weaponry. Are we prepared to help Ukraine in taking back Crimea, taking back eastern Ukraine and restoring their border OR have we just given enough to move the trench lines and settle into a stalemate. I fear it's the latter.”_

clean_body: Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe! From discussing Russia and Ukraine to Biden's leadership, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week. | | New Book Out Now! Dawn of the Brave, Mike's new children’s book, is now out! Order exclusively at BraveBooks.com \- $15 of every subscription goes to Samaritans Purse. BraveBooks.com In the News WALTZ ON AIDING UKRAINE To kick off the week, Mike Waltz joined on Sunday discuss the importance of continuing to aid Ukraine, saying: "If Zelensky continues to strike targets INSIDE of Russia, will Biden pump the breaks on “offensive” lethal aid? Will we give Ukraine everything they need for a decisive battlefield victory or allow Putin to dictate the terms?" Watch the interview . WALTZ ON BIDEN'S HANDLING OF PUTIN Then on Tuesday, Mike Waltz joined to talk discuss Florida's new Parental Rights in Education law and Biden's handling of Putin: "Why isn't the Biden Admin supporting Zelensky in their effort to win? Are they going to continue helping Ukrainians go on the offensive even if that means hitting Russian proper OR will Biden see that as too escalatory and pump the brakes?" Watch the interview . WALTZ ON UKRAINIAN TROOPS On Wednesday, Mike joined to discuss whether Ukrainian troops are being trained to use advanced US aid. "The Biden White House continues to tiptoe around and let Putin set and dictate the terms." Watch the full interview . WALTZ ON BIDEN'S LEADERSHIP On Thursday, Mike was on where he discussed the effects Biden's blunders and apparent lack of strategy as president. "We should all want the Commander in Chief to be successful in a time of crisis but Biden has been making gaffe after gaffe. Biden is the Leader of the Free World and our adversaries are listening to every word he says. His apparent lack of strategy is worrisome." Watch the interview . WALTZ ON THE OFFENSIVE PLAY To end the week, Mike joined Fox News' on Friday to discuss the developing conflict in Ukraine and what the Pentagon must do to help the Ukrainian resistance: “ I would personally like to see, and I've pressed the Pentagon on this, to give them [Ukraine] offensive weaponry. Are we prepared to help Ukraine in taking back Crimea, taking back eastern Ukraine and restoring their border OR have we just given enough to move the trench lines and settle into a stalemate. I fear it's the latter.” Watch the entire segment . Essential Mission Brief Reading (And Listening) Store Our Online Store is live! If you haven't checked it out yet, . You can find all the Waltz Warriors shirts, hats, stickers, yard signs, and now...koozies! | Social Media Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Mike remember to use #WaltzWarriors That's it for this week. Thanks for all of you support and stay tuned for more! Be sure to follow Mike on social media! | | ---|--- Paid for by Michael Waltz For Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Tax Free Social Security
body:
When I first announced my run for Congress in 2019, this was one of the first policy proposals I offered – because it is so needed!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/w6892WJ3gttPcjz0hPGeDVqA/9STjR763Vsm4763pQgwYVUqfrg)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/w6892WJ3gttPcjz0hPGeDVqA/9STjR763Vsm4763pQgwYVUqfrg)House Republicans recently introduced a bill to make Social Security Tax Free!

My only question is . . . what took them so long?

When I first announced my run for Congress in 2019, this was one of the first policy proposals I offered – **because it is so needed!**

And guess who one of the bill’s co-sponsors is? That’s right, my RINO opponent, Do-Nothing Dan!

He’s had 10 years in Congress to sit around and think about the needs of his Constituents (most of whom are retired and reliant upon Social Security) and this bright idea of not double-taxing our Senior Citizens never popped into his head before I mentioned it?

**It truly is amazing how ineffective and useless our politicians are.**

And that’s [why I’m running against a do-nothing, career politician, and it’s why I need your help to win!](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/w6892WJ3gttPcjz0hPGeDVqA/9STjR763Vsm4763pQgwYVUqfrg)

America is in crisis in so many ways.

We can’t continue to hand the reins of government over to the same people who have continued to wreck our nation year-after-year!

[Help me get to Washington and help me lead our nation](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/w6892WJ3gttPcjz0hPGeDVqA/9STjR763Vsm4763pQgwYVUqfrg) away from the tired, lazy ways of the establishment, and let’s start fighting for America.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Yesterday’s rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, Yesterday I went to a Medicare for All rally in Tacoma. It was held yesterday because it was the anniversary of the death of Daniel Desnoyers, who died because he couldn’t get the medication he needed. Why couldn’t he get it? He lost his insurance coverage after not paying a $20 fee that he wasn’t aware of. Daniel was only 29 years old. Ever since, Daniel’s father Scott has been working to get universal healthcare in the US. Daniel’s death is a senseless tragedy. His health insurance company and the entire health insurance industry has blood on its hands. Over 300,000 Covid deaths in the US have been due to lack of healthcare. That’s why I keep fighting.
