clean_body: | | | Hi there, Yesterday I went to a Medicare for All rally in Tacoma. It was held yesterday because it was the anniversary of the death of Daniel Desnoyers, who died because he couldn’t get the medication he needed. Why couldn’t he get it? He lost his insurance coverage after not paying a $20 fee that he wasn’t aware of. Daniel was only 29 years old. Ever since, Daniel’s father Scott has been working to get universal healthcare in the US. Daniel’s death is a senseless tragedy. His health insurance company and the entire health insurance industry has blood on its hands. Over 300,000 Covid deaths in the US have been due to lack of healthcare. That’s why I keep fighting. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Ohio Republicans are pushing an anti-LGBTQ bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
We cannot let this discrimination and hate come to Ohio.

**“GOP lawmakers introduce version of 'Don't Say Gay' bill in Ohio”**
_\- ABC News, 4/6/22_
Team,

In the wake of the Florida legislature passing a discriminatory bill attacking the LGBTQ community, Ohio Republicans have taken a look at their counterparts in Florida – and decided they’d like to do the same – except it’s _even worse._

**This week, extremist Republicans introduced a bill that would censor any classroom discussion about gender identity or sexual orientation for many students.**
This is an outrageous and disgusting attempt to erase and marginalize the LGBTQ+ community and it has no place in Ohio. As governor, I will not stand for it or any other such attacks.

**[I promise that I will fight every day – as I have throughout my life – for equal rights for all, and to end censorship of the LGBTQ+ community. If you’re with me, add your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43994856/339641478/-175350091?ms=nw_em_220410_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220410_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDcxYmU2MC0zNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ZZSpYo885LKVeZ74xzjoEFBydn0f8l9u-z9r2tMDI4=&emci=3a290e87-33b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6d71be60-34b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)**

At every step of the way, Mike DeWine has failed to make our state more inclusive. One example in a long list is his refusal to block a bill allowing businesses to discriminate, instead enshrining into law one of the most homophobic bills into the country.

We cannot allow him to continue this record of discrimination and hate.
On the same day the U.S. Supreme Court ruled on the Obergefell decision, I was the first person in Ohio to officiate a same-sex marriage in our state and when elected, I will be the first Ohio governor to sign comprehensive anti-discimination protections for LGBTQ+ Ohioans into law.

**[If you agree, please – add your name right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43994857/339641479/-175350091?ms=nw_em_220410_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220410_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDcxYmU2MC0zNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ZZSpYo885LKVeZ74xzjoEFBydn0f8l9u-z9r2tMDI4=&emci=3a290e87-33b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6d71be60-34b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)**

Onward,
Nan Whaley

** **
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43994858/339641480/-175350091?ms=nw_em_220410_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220410_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDcxYmU2MC0zNGI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ZZSpYo885LKVeZ74xzjoEFBydn0f8l9u-z9r2tMDI4=&emci=3a290e87-33b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6d71be60-34b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)****

Friend,

_"...our editorial board’s endorsement goes to Cranley, 48, with his record of success and inclusivity guiding a robust Cincinnati economic recovery as the city’s mayor for the last eight years, working with a politically divided City Council. His tenure included a remarkable turnaround in police-community relations, which, among other consequences, has earned Cranley the backing of the Rev. Dr. Otis Moss Jr. of Cleveland."_
The Cleveland Plain Dealer knows what you’ve known all along. John Cranley and Teresa Fedor are the team that knows Ohio’s best days aren’t behind us and have the plan and experience to build the comeback we desperately need.
**John and Teresa can’t do it without you. Let’s do this!
Team Cranley-Fedor
John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena, are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

name: Tim Ryan
subject: No overnight solutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ][IMG]

Friends,

Every good athlete knows that securing a game day win starts before you
even step onto the field.

You need more than the right gameplan. You need to put in the time and the
effort to ensure that you have what it takes to execute in the moment and
persevere until the job is done, no matter what.

That’s why we’ve got to gear up NOW to make sure we can go up against
Mitch McConnell and his dark-money fundraising machine and come out on
top.

This will be one of the fiercest, most competitive races of 2022—and one
of the most expensive. There’s no such thing as an off
season, folks—[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1014&amount=5&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]will you chip in $5 or more to
ensure we have the resources we need to flip this seat BLUE?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1015&amount=5&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate $5 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1016&amount=50&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1017&amount=100&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1018&amount=200&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1019&amount=250&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1020&amount=30&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Other Amount

Election analysts say that flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of our
best chances to expand our Democratic majority.

We’re facing an uphill fight—but at this moment in the race, we have a
major advantage as Republicans have their efforts and war chests focused
on winning a messy GOP primary.

While they’re fighting amongst themselves to see who can be Donald Trump’s
biggest lackey, we have an opportunity to build up our resources so that
we’re prepared to take on the winner of the GOP primary and keep up the
fight to put workers first from now until November.

We know that the eventual GOP candidate will receive millions in support
from outside groups, so it’s critical for us to use this time to gain as
much of a head start as possible—[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1021&amount=5&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]will you pitch in to help us build the
grassroots operation we need to organize across the state?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1008&amount=5&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate $5 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1009&amount=50&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1010&amount=100&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1011&amount=200&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1012&amount=250&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10450?t=1013&amount=30&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Other Amount

There are no overnight solutions. But together, I know that we have what
it takes to win BIG and start delivering real change for American workers.

Let’s do this,

Tim Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=3192%2E3611125%2EKBx-6E ][IMG]

name: Happy Birthday Melania Trump!
subject: Will you wish America’s favorite First Lady a Happy Birthday?
body:
Peter,
We know you miss Melania Trump in the White House, and we do too.

Our favorite First Lady’s birthday is coming up soon, and we want to surprise her with the ULTIMATE birthday card from our top Trump supporters!

subject: re: Justice Sonia Sotomayor --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We need your signature TODAY:
| | | **URGENT:** _Roe v. Wade_ is in SERIOUS danger of being overturned -- putting millions of Americans' rights in jeopardy -- **and Justice Sonia Sotomayor is raising the alarm:**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5996?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220410-RoevWadeAlert-SotomayorQuote-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220410-RoevWadeAlert-SotomayorQuote-Pros-sl1&akid=3721%2E9716520%2ElC2mjI)
Team -- We MUST show the far-right majority on the Supreme Court that we will not stand by while Republicans wage a war on abortion rights in this country.

The latest case before the Court could be the one that OVERTURNS _Roe v. Wade_ and erases a vital constitutional right. **The threat is so dire that Justice Sotomayor is DIRECTLY calling out the dangers.**

**Stand with Justice Sotomayor: [Sign our Democratic petition calling on the Supreme Court to DEFEND reproductive rights and SAVE _Roe v. Wade_!](https://go.dscc.org/go/5996?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220410-RoevWadeAlert-SotomayorQuote-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220410-RoevWadeAlert-SotomayorQuote-Pros-sl1&akid=3721%2E9716520%2ElC2mjI)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: 2022 Legislative Session Wrap-Up & Campaign Update Week 14
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Brice Wiggins for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/62e90ff34327/2022-legislative-session-wrap-up-campaign-update-week-14?e=698f056321)
---
[](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7f5443a34b&e=698f056321)
Hello, I’m Brice Wiggins, and I’m running for Congress in Mississippi’s 4th Congressional District in the Republican primary, June 7. You can learn more about me, my record and my campaign [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=36ecda0d10&e=698f056321). Below are some highlights from our 2022 Legislative Session that just ended this week. As I transition from my State Senator role to U.S. Congressional candidate, I invite you to keep up with us as I hit the campaign trail.
## Legislative Session Wrap-Up
The 2022 Legislative Session has come to an end, and I’m proud to say it will go down as one of the most monumental Sessions in Mississippi history. Looking back over the past few months, this Session has been like no other.
|
---
_**“The harder the conflict, the greater the triumph.”**_ _**— George Washington**_
|
---
Through my leadership in the State Senate, we came together and navigated many difficult, but necessary negotiations while staying true to our conservative principles. My experience negotiating many of these policies, along with the successes of this session, demonstrate why I’m the right person to represent the 4th Congressional District in Congress. _\- I don't just talk about change, I create change.__\- I don't just talk about policy, I write policy.__\- I don't just talk about positions, I stand up and fight for what WE believe in.__\- I’m not afraid to show up and take action. I’m not afraid to take a stand.__**Not one of my congressional opponents can say the same.**_ This past session was about creating positive change, and I’m honored to have been part of making a difference for the people of Mississippi.
Legislating is hard work when you actually show up and turn words into action. I’m all about action that creates real change to better the lives of the people I am elected to represent and everyone who calls Mississippi home.Click****[**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=bd9d22cfa6&e=698f056321) for details on my involvement in these accomplishments.I hope you will consider my passion and strong record of getting things done both efficiently and effectively. I ask for your vote and support on June 7.
|
---
# Campaign Trail Highlights
| | | | | |
## Senior Pickleball!
[**WATCH HERE:**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d9d131ca7d&e=698f056321) Friday fun playing Pickleball at Pascagoula Senior Center.
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=5566ed6b01&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=cf6d12ce22&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Merit Health Tour
It was a humbling experience to meet and share my appreciation with a few of our U.S. Veterans, as well as the incredible nurses and staff caring for them while touring Merit Health Wesley in Hattiesburg. Thank you ALL for your service!
---
| | | | | |
## OS Meet & Greet
BIG thanks to the Young Family for helping our campaign make a splash at their beautiful home in Ocean Springs this weekend! Also, to everyone who came out to support our efforts.
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=a34817e140&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=c46d98b62f&e=698f056321)
---
|
## #WorldHealthDay
High-level healthcare leads to high-paying jobs along with increased economic activity. I pledge to do all I can to build on and expand our economy by supporting efforts to make Mississippi's healthcare system stronger.
---
Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=bc0f15f6c2&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---

Legislative Session Wrap-Up The 2022 Legislative Session has come to an end, and I’m proud to say it will go down as one of the most monumental Sessions in Mississippi history. Looking back over the past few months, this Session has been like no other. | “The harder the conflict, the greater the triumph.” — George Washington | Through my leadership in the State Senate, we came together and navigated many difficult, but necessary negotiations while staying true to our conservative principles. My experience negotiating many of these policies, along with the successes of this session, demonstrate why I’m the right person to represent the 4th Congressional District in Congress. \- I don't just talk about change, I create change.\- I don't just talk about policy, I write policy.\- I don't just talk about positions, I stand up and fight for what WE believe in.\- I’m not afraid to show up and take action. I’m not afraid to take a stand.Not one of my congressional opponents can say the same. This past session was about creating positive change, and I’m honored to have been part of making a difference for the people of Mississippi. Legislating is hard work when you actually show up and turn words into action. I’m all about action that creates real change to better the lives of the people I am elected to represent and everyone who calls Mississippi home.Click** for details on my involvement in these accomplishments.I hope you will consider my passion and strong record of getting things done both efficiently and effectively. I ask for your vote and support on June 7. | Campaign Trail Highlights | | | | | | Senior Pickleball! Friday fun playing Pickleball at Pascagoula Senior Center. | | | | | | | | Merit Health Tour It was a humbling experience to meet and share my appreciation with a few of our U.S. Veterans, as well as the incredible nurses and staff caring for them while touring Merit Health Wesley in Hattiesburg. Thank you ALL for your service! | | | | | | OS Meet & Greet BIG thanks to the Young Family for helping our campaign make a splash at their beautiful home in Ocean Springs this weekend! Also, to everyone who came out to support our efforts. | | | | | | | | #WorldHealthDay High-level healthcare leads to high-paying jobs along with increased economic activity. I pledge to do all I can to build on and expand our economy by supporting efforts to make Mississippi's healthcare system stronger. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wadeparade?refcode=whem0410 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wadeparade?refcode=whem0410]
Good evening Peter,
As the Democratic primary approaches, Wade has been busy doing everything he can to reach as many voters as possible across the district!
Last weekend, Wade went to Darien to attend the Blessing of the Fleet – an annual tradition where shrimping boats pass under the bridge and receive their blessing for the shrimping season ahead. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/wade%2004.10edit_4.jpg]
On Saturday, Wade spoke at the grand opening of the Camden County Democratic Headquarters. It’s an exciting time to be a Democrat in Georgia! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/wade%2004.10edit_3.jpg]
The next day, Wade attended a beautiful service at the Little Bryan Baptist Church, and was able to meet with dozens of Georgians who are just as excited about change in Washington as we are. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/wade%2004.10edit_1.jpg]
On Tuesday, Wade headed back to his hometown to address the AME Georgia Annual Conference over in Macon. Thank you to Bishop Reginald T. Jackson for the opportunity! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/wade%2004.10edit_2.jpg]
Wade wrapped up the week attending an event with Scenic America, an organization dedicated to preserving the visual character & beauty of America. One of the pillars of Wade’s campaign is Coastal Resilience and protecting our environment and this was a great opportunity for us to learn more about what can be done to keep our nature & climate intact. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/wade%2004.10edit.jpg]
With the election just around the corner, Wade will only be getting busier in the coming weeks. If you know of an event that Wade should put on his calendar, let us know at info@wadeherringforcongress.com!
Onward,
Wade Herring HQ
Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wadeparade?refcode=whem0410]

| Peter,

Now more than ever, we need bold leadership in Congress that won’t back down from big challenges or shy away from bullies who threaten our Democratic ideals.

As an attorney, I’ve taken on some pretty _big_ fights – **including challenging Donald Trump’s Muslim Ban in the Supreme Court.**

That ban was an attack on our country’s values: it turned America's back on those in need, eroded our moral standing in the world, and made us less safe. I’m proud that I was part of the effort to take on Trump in federal court.

In Congress, I’ll keep fighting back against attacks on our Democratic values, no matter what comes our way.

[_**But I need your help to win this race. Unfortunately, campaigns cost a lot of money, and we need to bring in another 31 donations before midnight to stay on track with our goals. We need a Congress that will fight to uphold our Democratic ideals, and that means we need to protect our Democratic House Majority.

The good news is that national experts are calling NY-22 the GOP seat most likely to flip from red to blue this fall.

But we can’t take anything for granted. If there’s one thing I’ve learned over the course of my career, it’s that the most important battles are sometimes the toughest ones.

_Peter, let’s not wake up on November 9th wishing we had done more._

[_**I know we can flip this seat blue together. But, it will take hard work from all of us. Will you do your part and make a $5 donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43993705/339615992/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220410-Z-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWMwNzIyNS0yNmI5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fige5XVrvJGiewFynk9Mf1seEmZgAR_sISMtXCfK6a0=)
